With the help of you and this grassroots team, we made history last year – flipping the Virginia House, expanding our majorities, and securing victories in over 30 special elections. But we can’t take our foot off the gas now – the stakes are too high. State Democrats are facing legislative elections in 44 states this November. Electing Democratic leaders who will support President Biden’s agenda in statehouses across the country is critical to building a better future in your state. But it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to own a piece of this fight and give state Democrats the resources they need to go toe-to-toe against their Republican opponents. As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight to defeat extremist state Republicans, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future in your state. name: Losing Steam (FFR)
subject: Jon Tester has a 𝙫𝙞𝙩𝙖𝙡 warning!
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
Don’t ignore him!
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=21456%2E4449941%2El8YY-n)
---
**Look, this _vital_ warning from Jon Tester is a MUST READ for all good Democrats: ** | []() | [Our end _Citizens United_ campaign is LOSING STEAM, we need you to step up now: Chip in $7 before midnight on Tuesday to support our work »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/43931?t=7&akid=21456%2E4449941%2El8YY-n)
---
**GOAL: $5,100 | DAILY GOAL: $1,700 | DEADLINE: TUESDAY @ MIDNIGHT**
**Senator Tester hit the nail on the head.** Billionaires shouldn’t be able to buy elections, it harms and corrupts our very democracy.

But unless we all step up, dark money-backed Republicans will steamroll our efforts to end _Citizens United_ and we’ll lose our window of opportunity.
[**So we’re joining Senator Tester in this fight and calling on you to stand alongside us: Chip in $7 to help us hit our $5,100 goal to end _Citizens United_ and support our work »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/43931?t=8&akid=21456%2E4449941%2El8YY-n)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/43932?t=9&akid=21456%2E4449941%2El8YY-n)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/43933?t=10&akid=21456%2E4449941%2El8YY-n)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/43934?t=11&akid=21456%2E4449941%2El8YY-n)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/43935?t=12&akid=21456%2E4449941%2El8YY-n)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/43931?t=13&akid=21456%2E4449941%2El8YY-n)
Thank you for everything,

– FFR
| | Paid political advertisement paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P.O. Box 66005, Washington, D.C. 20035.
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Your contribution to FFR will be used in connection with FFR’s matching funds program to match the contributions of other contributors. Contributions to End Citizens United Non-Federal are not tax deductible.
fightforreform.org Thank you for supporting Fight For Reform, a State Level Project of End Citizens United. The Supreme Court’s 2010 Citizens United v. FEC decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections. **Fight For Reform is standing up to Big Money by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.**

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26912?t=2&akid=21456%2E4449941%2El8YY-n). **Or, to help us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26913?t=3&akid=21456%2E4449941%2El8YY-n).**

[Click here](https://act.fightforreform.org/signup/Less-Emails/?t=4&akid=21456%2E4449941%2El8YY-n) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022?t=14&akid=21456%2E4449941%2El8YY-n). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Fight for Reform »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26914?t=5&akid=21456%2E4449941%2El8YY-n)
---

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Sunday News Digest: 5/26/2024
body:
Your daily rundown of REAL news for REAL Coloradans.
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**May 26, 2024** **SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST** **By Heidi Ganahl**
| | Hi readers,

As Memorial Day approaches, it's important to understand the significance of this solemn American holiday. Here are some facts about its history, traditions, and the sacrifices made by the U.S. armed forces (you can read the [full article](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) here).
* The first Memorial Day, originally known as Decoration Day, was observed on May 5, 1868, by the Grand Army of the Republic. It commemorated fallen troops from the Civil War, with Americans decorating graves across the country.
* Memorial Day became a floating federal holiday on January 1, 1971, under the Uniform Monday Holiday Act, shifting it to the last Monday in May.
* Over the years, approximately 651,031 American troops have died in battle, with countless others serving in theaters of war.
* Each Memorial Day weekend, Arlington National Cemetery welcomes over 135,000 visitors, with approximately 260,000 graves adorned with American flags.
* Memorial Day weekend marks the unofficial start of summer and sees significant travel activity, with an estimated 43 million Americans traveling, mainly via road trips.
* Memorial Day celebrations often include barbecues, contributing to approximately $1.3 billion in national meat sales during the holiday weekend.

Again, you can read the full article with more facts [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). As we commemorate Memorial Day, let us honor the memory of those who made the ultimate sacrifice in service to our nation, and reflect on the freedoms we enjoy today.
God bless you all,
Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
| | **STATE**
---
**[Bills Signed By Governor Polis This Week](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Colorado Governor Jared Polis has been active in signing multiple bills into law, including one aimed at implementing comprehensive guidelines for funeral facilities.
**[GOP Super PAC Invests $5 Million in 8th Congressional District Race Amidst Fierce Contest](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) ** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A GOP-affiliated super PAC has earmarked $5 million for advertising in Colorado's hotly contested 8th Congressional District race. This financial commitment underscores the significance of this district in the 2024 elections.
**[Transition to reformulated gas in nine Front Range counties will result in price increase there. How high will it go?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Keep an eye on gas prices in the next few weeks, Colorado, and you can watch a major policy battle play out between an extremely irritated Gov. Jared Polis and officials enforcing the federal Clean Air Act.
**[State taxpayers to lose $2.8 billion in TABOR refunds due to legislature, study shows](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) As a result of 101 bills passed by the Colorado legislature, over $2.8 billion in state TABOR refunds will not go to Colorado taxpayers between 2024 and 2026, according to a recent report from the Common Sense Institute.
_**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**NATIONAL**
**[Could Trump Turn the Bronx Red?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE FREE PRESS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) In an overgrown field in the Bronx, a borough that has not voted red in a presidential election since 1924, Orthodox Jews, fraternity brothers, George Santos, Dominican immigrants, off-duty firefighters, and thousands of others are craning their necks for a view of Donald J. Trump.
**[American Confidence in Elections: Preventing Noncitizen Voting and Other Foreign Interference](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [HERITAGE FOUNDATION](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) We should provide both access and security in the election process. We want to ensure that every eligible citizen is able to vote and that those votes are not diluted, voided, or stolen due to unlawful registration and voting by aliens who have no right to participate in our political and election process and by the unfair and unjust inclusion of aliens in the apportionment of the House of Representatives, as well as the drawing of boundary lines for political districts at the federal, state and local level.
**[The Biden effect? Border Patrol has lost a quarter of workforce since 2020 election](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [WASHINGTON EXAMINER](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The sweeping Trump-era tax cuts in the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act of 2017 are set to expire next year, setting up the tax debate as a potentially key political issue this election year.
**[Nikki Haley says she will vote for Donald Trump following their disputes during Republican primary](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Nikki Haley said Wednesday that she will be voting for Donald Trump in the general election, a notable show of support given their intense and often personal rivalry during the Republican primary calendar.
_**[READ MORE NATIONAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**LOCAL**
**[Some surprised with renewal of Denver City Council term limit proposal](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [WESTWORD](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Denver City Council members Amanda Sandoval and Amanda Sawyer have reintroduced the idea of decreasing city term limits from three to two terms, much to the surprise of many other members of council.
**[El Paso, Teller counties to get $66 million in grants to address opioid epidemic](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COLORADO SPRINGS GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) El Paso and Teller counties are expected to receive $66 million through 2038 to address the opioid epidemic, a scourge that has claimed hundreds of thousands of lives nationally.
**[Meeting announced to consider interchange plans for I-70 and 29 Road in Mesa County](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Residents of Mesa County and the City of Grand Junction are invited to a public meeting to discuss an interchange at Interstate 70 and 29 Road, a press statement from Mesa County reads.

**['Center of the gold universe', this one spot is oft ignored by tourists in Idaho Springs](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [OUT THERE COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A stone monument stands near a junction of highways that was once known as a junction of creeks. It stands inconspicuous, just a rock atop a block. It's been even easier to miss lately, surrounded by orange construction wrap, lost in the hubbub.
_**[READ MORE LOCAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**COMMENTARY**
**[Moriarty: Democrats Colorado Energy Story Has a Bad Ending](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Colorado Governor Jared Polis and the Colorado democrats tell us a story about fossil fuels. This story has three parts: fossil fuels are bad, the democrats have a plan to eliminate fossil fuels, and their plan is working._
**[Applegate: Possible solutions for El Paso County's immigration problem](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _El Paso County recently saw two busloads of immigrants here illegally come down from Denver. Since Denver 's sanctuary city policies create their own fiscal burden, they now claim they cannot afford to keep taking care of lawbreakers they attracted in the first place._
**[Cooper: Colorado May Have A Problem with 12,000+ Disappearing Undeliverable Ballots](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _The Colorado Open Record Act (CORA) allows citizens to examine public records of payments via invoices as well as a long list of election records for every election. CORA enables state and county officials to provide transparency for citizens, so they have access to and confidence in our governance._
**[Caldara: Looming gas price hike entirely Jared Polis' doing](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COMPLETE COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _The Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) tells us Colorado has an ozone problem and we are out of compliance with their standards. Therefore, gasoline in the Denver metro area will need to be reformulated to their liking, adding between $0.50 to $1 per gallon as penance_
__
**_[READ MORE COMMENTARY](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_**
|
---
**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming a RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [brian@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com)) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
**🤔 DID YOU KNOW?** 25 cities have laid claim to being the **birthplace of Memorial Day** , however on May 26, 1966, President Lyndon B. Johnson designated an "official" birthplace of the holiday by signing the presidential proclamation naming **Waterloo, New York** , as the holder of the title.

|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "Valor is stability, not of legs and arms, but of courage and the soul." --Michel de Montaigne
|

body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85693477/475579826/-370926572?amount=10&refcode=UD_20240526_EMSPL_E3_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZjN2U1MDQ5LWMwMWItZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=th80lWMZuwgNO0fTxRanKfLrbf9qI-P916cB1nJsAy8=) Peter,

I have some incredible news to share:

**The first poll of the 2024 election shows our campaign with a one-point lead over MAGA Republican Ken Calvert.** **Will Rollins:** 45%

"Who gets what when and how" \- that is Harold Lasswell's classic definition. Politics is about **resources** and their allocation.
In modern life, "the personal is political." That is the legacy of second-wave feminism and social movements from BLM back to the 1960's. Politics is about **recognition**.
My politics honors both: a focus on resources _and_ recognition. Law and economics, to be sure, but also sports, entertainment, pop culture, and identity. In short, almost any aspect of public life. And how it intersects, if at all, with my private world, and what is deeply personal to me.
This is Pai's Politics.
I will be writing when I see something in the news that interests me. If this interests you, I am grateful. You can also unsubscribe at any time, below -- no hard feelings.
Talk soon,
_aditya pai_

Why is Caitlin Clark so popular?
If you're Team Caitlin you might point to her charisma and unique on-court panache. If you're a critic, you think it's because she's white. The truth is none of the above.
**Caitlin Clark is popular because she has mastered an athletic skill that does not rely much on athleticism. **
In every other physical aspect of basketball - speed, size, strength, agility, vertical jump - the most talented male player is far superior to the most talented female. Fans want to watch the best players, plain and simple. So NBA viewership has always dwarfed the WNBA.
**But shooting - unlike, say, dunking - is about dexterity, not dominance.**
Enter Caitlin.
Counter to the culture of women's basketball, Clark's game is all about the 3-point shot. Her performances beyond the arc are electrifying, and [objectively excellent](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a517cab2-0009-4300-9bdf-b1a84214dd9b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
Caitlin Clark can flat out shoot. No one can deny it. **And she can shoot just as well -- or better -- than the boys.**
That's why fans like me who weren't watching women's basketball before are tuned in now. This is a great development for all of women's sport.
Why isn't that obvious to the WNBA veterans throwing shade at Clark?
In the subtle yet brutal way women can undermine each other, the [elders](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ffbe7fea-ee10-47ef-933e-8b50a0441559?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) have [gone after](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/9c903646-fbc9-469c-a583-8d6cc042e5da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) this poor girl -- and she seems visibly affected by the hate. The [pile on ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/1ec955f6-060c-46e3-b8a6-6af07628f3e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)recently got so bad that [Charles Barkley](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/1399a23c-8181-42a2-b9a7-ed02736cbf8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [Lebron James](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/4cd41027-592e-4a40-b8d5-b77637af6a5c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) came to her defense.
These slacktivists should be ashamed of themselves. Their claim that Clark's rise is caused by white privilege is absurd. And it entirely misapprehends why the WNBA has struggled relative to the NBA in the past, and why it now has a very bright future.
It also reveals how the braindead hackery that pervades our politics has now also infected sport.
That's sad.
The only solution is Caitlin has to keep shooting. And we have to keep watching to support her.
This woman represents something now rare in our culture: _objective excellence_.
**In a sea of mediocrity, diversity hires, participation trophies, and rampant grade inflation at elite universities, Clark 's skill stands out. Her celebrity is truly worth celebrating.**
Shooters shoot - and Clark, above all, must never stop.
[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/71a7ae4d-d6b9-44b3-9632-8027e518b4b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)Photographer: Cooper Neill/NBAE/Getty Images

body:
I can just about guarantee this is the shortest email in your inbox right now
| | |
---
It’s Debbie, friend — sorry to reach out again so late this evening, but I can _guarantee_ this is the shortest email in your inbox right now — do you have 30 seconds to spare?
We just need about 6 more donations from supporters in your area to hit our FINAL weekly goal before we head into the end of the month. **[_Chip in here to help me defeat Rick Scott in 2024 — our blue Senate majority depends on it._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85693548/475588333/1820369458?refcode=jtk1281-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWU4YTYxMTctYzMxYi1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M--x4xOV3rShd5kM45Ru83pPwxTxuqghn-5FyKyhYyo=)**
This is our biggest and most important goal yet, friend, so it would mean a lot if you could help me hit this goal before our numbers go public in just a couple weeks.
With gratitude,

Debbie

Peter, I have to come clean before our end-of-month deadline...

Unlike my Democrat opponent, I’m not buddies with socialist billionaires or woke CEOs. This campaign is for the people of Florida and is run by the people of Florida, and that includes patriots like you.

[**I’m asking you humbly because the clock is ticking. Can you follow the link and spare a small donation to help us reach this critical end-of-month deadline?**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=92f370bdcee045b195c43ca7e5237142&_e=9OWGZ7fxtaWkJsjwsQf-pFk0vfWnY-tJSvVPjzdH9DR7gO89i0Uc724q0MDulALZUSOFk7mZOobtk4Ex4rMX4IXTb2h7pwFtdh4v3PU7PEhGvvjzLUn98w1dcqxYtpDk5C2xRTgDhc6VjY23TlaTRuIXi_tE7WeVr5GiQ3ZHEKyINNjSFqrqNGuiVMyhvyuVFX07bl6SdwT9HzD8ezT7iJ50V0gaZFTCc_pTRc-xwFvcfLezGn8r-4x-KxQLF2gMp9lSlfcaqlUGLhRVzOZnfCb1-T1iOagUSat0R_JpWoHEdEcA6xQiI88ymP8nEwc6UXVoYoEXLzjqT8OKTSb5nzPkRqxWUWaS-8tLRvt-9fI%3D)

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: would ya look at that . . .
body:
You really should take a look at this . . .
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

Do you honestly believe the Pro-Life Movement can defeat the Abortion Lobby, their puppet President Joe Biden, and the rest of _Planned Parenthood’s_ political pals in Congress this November?

**Because you SHOULD!

_Why?_**

Because _, as I’ll tell you shortly,_ a little secret that media elites are doing all they can to keep hidden . . .

. . . Pro-lifers have been winning A LOT recently.

_Students for Life Action_ has been busy for months now putting our 2024 Election Plans into action. Before we get to the Fall Election calling out the abortion extremism of Joe Biden and Democrats, the first part of our plans has been to stop the Abortion Lobby from gaining ground in the Republican Party.

And we’ve already reaped some massive rewards for the Pro-Life Movement _– all thanks to the generous support of good folks like you, Pro-Life Friend._

_And everything I’m about to tell you below will attest to that_!

But first, I need you to please do me one huge favor.

When you’re done reading through what _Students for life Action_ has been up to in recent weeks, could you please forward this email to ANY pro-lifers you know so they can see the amazing work we’re doing?

And, of course, if you feel like going above and beyond once you’ve done that, **[you could always chip in to help fund our election efforts with your most generous contribution of $100, $50, or even $25](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-gxhydl-duchtdja-y/).**

## **A MAJOR Shot in the Arm**
Just a few weeks ago, _Students for Life Action_ wrapped up our **$200,000 Election Year Matching Challenge,** and supporters like you absolutely CRUSHED IT!

As you probably know, we were lucky enough to have two especially generous donors _– one from Florida and the other from Texas –_ offer to match every donation we received up to $200,000 for a short time.

And thanks to so many incredible pro-lifers like yourself, Pro-Life Friend, we were able to fully realize the potential of the ENTIRE Matching Challenge _– and then some!_

With all the support we received, _Students for Life Action_ got a HUGE boost of momentum!

### **[>> DONATE TO _STUDENTS FOR LIFE ACTION’S_ ELECTION PROGRAMS << ](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-gxhydl-duchtdja-j/)**
## **Life is Winning Across America!**
Needless to say, we’re not wasting a moment turning our supporters’ generosity into pro-life wins.

And we’ve been very busy during the primary election season in multiple states, showing Republicans they can’t cross us without paying the price politically.

**_INDIANA_**

In Indiana – a state we’re continuing to operate in to close loopholes in the Hoosier State’s pro-life law – we have the Abortion Lobby on the run.

On the Tuesday, May 7th Republican Primary, FIVE pro-life champions won their primaries against weak-kneed GOP opponents, including:

o Hunter Smith – District 24
o Lorissa Sweet – District 50
o Matt Hostettler – District 64
o Zach Payne – District 66
o Michael Young – District 35
Leading up to the election, _Students for Life Action_ volunteers sent 29,126 text messages, made 15,974 phone calls, and knocked on 971 doors across the Hoosier state!

In the past few years, _Students for Life Action_ has been heavily involved in Indiana helping to introduce legislation, a _Chemical Abortion Prevention Act,_ which would end the distribution, sale, and manufacture of dangerous Chemical Abortion Pills, which kill babies and can cause injury, infertility, and death to mothers.

**_WEST VIRGINIA_**

As my home state, West Virginia is very important to me. Sadly, even in a state as pro-life as West Virginia, there are some Republicans who still want as many abortions as possible to be legal.

One of those was Senate President Craig Blair who stopped all pro-life amendments from even being voted on during a recent floor fight as he wanted as many “exception” abortions as possible.

It turns out that his constituents weren’t happy about this as Senator Blair was defeated in his May 14th primary.

That wasn’t the only crucial race though as the GOP establishment went after our bill sponsor and pro-life champion, Senator Patricia Rucker. But pro-lifers successfully defended her on primary day in an incredibly close race.

The fact that WE ARE proving so successful at the ballot box is only bolstering our election programs as more and more legislators realize _Students for Life Action_ means business!

We’re winning in many state legislative battles too, including:

**_MAINE_**

When the pro-abortion Governor Janet Mills asked lawmakers to amend the state constitution to guarantee the right to an abortion . . .

. . . _Students for Life Action_ and other state pro-life voices were there in force, and the measure was voted down!

**_NEW HAMPSHIRE_**

[](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-gxhydl-duchtdja-i/) Where our pro-life activism stopped a proposed pro-abortion constitutional amendment that would’ve enshrined abortion throughout the Granite State.

_Students for Life Action_ actively campaigned in New Hampshire engaging with voters, testifying before the State Legislature, and otherwise leading the charge against a proposed pro-abortion constitutional amendment, just as we did last session when the GOP Governor John Sununu tried to gut the state’s _Late-Term Abortion Prevention Law!_

**_KENTUCKY_**

This spring, _Students for Life Action_ held firm against SB 99 and House Bill 711, which sought to create exceptions to allow abortions in cases of rape, among other things!

Our activists led statewide texting campaigns, targeted flyering campaigns, and public lobbying and advocacy! Despite pro-abortion Kentucky Democrats (and Republicans!) trying to introduce exceptions for preborn babies to be slaughtered, the Pro-Life Movement didn’t budge and played a key role in the Kentucky state legislature denying any such changes!

**_IDAHO_**

Where SIX pro-life leaders just won their House and Senate primary races against weak-kneed Republican incumbents!

Leading up to the election, _Students for Life Action_ sent out 65,064 text messages, and made 38,952 phone calls across all eleven targeted districts!

These victories only strengthen the pro-life alliance that exists in Idaho and will pave the way for future victories in November like the passage of our _Clean Water for ALL Life Act,_ which will end Chemical Abortions in the Gem State..

### **[>> DONATE TO _STUDENTS FOR LIFE ACTION’S_ ELECTION PROGRAMS << ](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-gxhydl-duchtdja-d/)**
## **REFERENDUM Battles**
_Students for Life Action_ has also been on the ground fighting for the past several months with our election programs in key "Abortion on the Ballot" states, including in:

[](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-gxhydl-duchtdja-h/) **>>> Florida **– In April, the Florida Supreme Court upheld the state’s previous _15-Week Abortion Prevention Act,_ which meant that the _Students for Life Action-inspired Heartbeat Abortion Prevention Law_ was finally able to go in effect earlier this month!

Not only that, but President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris have been all over the Sunshine State ranting about expanding access to abortion. Our _Students for Life Action_ leaders countered them with several protests, and our Pro-Life Video Billboard Truck even was there!

**>>> Missouri **– As you know, there’s an extreme abortion ballot referendum pending, which would enshrine abortion in the state constitution.

_Students for Life Action_ has been door knocking in the state several times already, even in downpours!

_Students for Life Action_ launched our National “Decline to Sign” Campaign designed to stop these pro-abortion referendums.

With your help, _Students for Life Action_ is going to continue to fight wherever we can!

Taking on a nation and a pro-abortion administration could not be done without your prayers and support, Pro-Life Friend.

### **[>> DONATE TO _STUDENTS FOR LIFE ACTION’S_ ELECTION PROGRAMS << ](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-gxhydl-duchtdja-k/)**
## **Training for November!**
Recently, we hosted several trainings for young pro-lifers in West Virginia, North Carolina, New Hampshire, and many more states as _Students for Life Action_ has a goal of training 4,540 new activists in 2024.

These trainings are crucial to the future of the Pro-Life Movement, as many of our future leaders and fighters get their start at one of these events.

At these critical trainings, our student pro-life activists learn things like:

➔ The Real Nature of Politics – why “educating” people alone won’t result in the changes we need;

➔ The Biggest Lie in Politics – and how the political class uses our convictions against us;

➔ How _Students for Life Action_ is working effectively in state capitals – getting bill sponsors and roll-call votes regardless of current leadership; and

➔ How to put pressure on legislators.
We plan to host several more of our Grassroots Training events throughout the rest of 2024 because numbers don’t lie.

85% of young people we train commit to carry the pro-life message throughout the rest of their lives!

### **[>> DONATE TO _STUDENTS FOR LIFE ACTION’S_ ELECTION PROGRAMS << ](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-gxhydl-duchtdja-u/)**
[](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-gxhydl-duchtdja-o/) All of this is only possible with the generous support of good folks like you.

We are growing bigger every day and there’s nothing the Abortion Lobby can do to stop us . . .

. . . As long as we continue to fight as hard as we can for the preborn.

So, now that you’ve read all this, could you please forward this email to every pro-life friend you know?

**[And then, if you’d like, could you chip in $100, $50, or even $25 to _Students for Life Action_ to help us continue our life-saving work](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-gxhydl-duchtdja-b/)?**

Thanks for taking the time to read my email!

I appreciate everything you do for Life, Pro-Life Friend!

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life Action_

### **[>> DONATE TO _STUDENTS FOR LIFE ACTION’S_ ELECTION PROGRAMS << ](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-gxhydl-duchtdja-n/)**

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

[update preferences](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.updatemyprofile.com/j-gxhydl-026154D2-duchtdja-p) | [unsubscribe](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-u-gxhydl-duchtdja-x/)
**

**
---

REFERENDUM Battles Students for Life Action has also been on the ground fighting for the past several months with our election programs in key "Abortion on the Ballot" states, including in: >>> Florida – In April, the Florida Supreme Court upheld the state’s previous 15-Week Abortion Prevention Act, which meant that the Students for Life Action-inspired Heartbeat Abortion Prevention Law was finally able to go in effect earlier this month! Not only that, but President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris have been all over the Sunshine State ranting about expanding access to abortion. Our Students for Life Action leaders countered them with several protests, and our Pro-Life Video Billboard Truck even was there! >> Missouri – As you know, there’s an extreme abortion ballot referendum pending, which would enshrine abortion in the state constitution. Students for Life Action has been door knocking in the state several times already, even in downpours! Students for Life Action launched our National “Decline to Sign” Campaign designed to stop these pro-abortion referendums. With your help, Students for Life Action is going to continue to fight wherever we can! Taking on a nation and a pro-abortion administration could not be done without your prayers and support, Pro-Life Friend. Training for November! Recently, we hosted several trainings for young pro-lifers in West Virginia, North Carolina, New Hampshire, and many more states as Students for Life Action has a goal of training 4,540 new activists in 2024. These trainings are crucial to the future of the Pro-Life Movement, as many of our future leaders and fighters get their start at one of these events. At these critical trainings, our student pro-life activists learn things like: ➔ The Real Nature of Politics – why “educating” people alone won’t result in the changes we need; ➔ The Biggest Lie in Politics – and how the political class uses our convictions against us; ➔ How Students for Life Action is working effectively in state capitals – getting bill sponsors and roll-call votes regardless of current leadership; and ➔ How to put pressure on legislators. We plan to host several more of our Grassroots Training events throughout the rest of 2024 because numbers don’t lie. 85% of young people we train commit to carry the pro-life message throughout the rest of their lives! All of this is only possible with the generous support of good folks like you. We are growing bigger every day and there’s nothing the Abortion Lobby can do to stop us . . . . . . As long as we continue to fight as hard as we can for the preborn. So, now that you’ve read all this, could you please forward this email to every pro-life friend you know? ? Thanks for taking the time to read my email! I appreciate everything you do for Life, Pro-Life Friend! For Life, Kristan Hawkins President, Students for Life Action Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization. |

Friend,

The false Jan. 6 “insurrection” narrative is the greatest con job ever to happen in American politics, it's right up there with Russia Collusion.

Now, we’re finding out that former Congresswoman Liz Cheney, the main architect of this disinformation campaign, and her band of miscreants suppressed evidence that completely exonerates the Jan. 6 defendants from their ginned-up charge of insurrection.

**The Federalist’s Mollie Hemmingway has exposed the J6 committee for excluding Secret Service Agent Tony Ornato’s testimony from the evidentiary record.**

Ornato testified two years ago about the events before Jan. 6. He was assigned to the White House to coordinate presidential protection as deputy chief of staff. As a Secret Service officer with a distinguished decades-long apolitical career, it was impossible for the J6 committee to undermine his testimony, so they worm-holed it.

_**So, instead, they hid it.**_

Now that we’ve uncovered the truth, we must do everything possible to expose this message and make sure the Deep State does not rig the 2024 elections.

name: Gary Sinise
subject: The National Memorial Day Parade is back
body:
The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ...

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq83v1meaidb4lsogd9lmba8bk8dvarnaj6e2v80_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c3g62o31c5h2bs)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here.

You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI NY— but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders.

**This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.**

The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of the D-Day invasion, the American Veterans Center is bringing the Parade BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as a T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country.

**[Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv5ev8vreoen7cibki6rdbrdin6ktm60ggjhhcfo_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c3g62o31c5h2bs)**
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7dfuj6rav08ohm8j7ieak9248hcgirg8sqg63s8_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c3g62o31c5h2bs)
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2tov4ii3mlot5nito7d0f14p1u750ha7q0gc6lo_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c3g62o31c5h2bs)
---

---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp34l71qs7sp9ht2a416hnu5o9b31tamj2t3e7vg_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c3g62o31c5h2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.
* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.
* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zltaeqbv7cos1gqpss6iibnm12rkmntr9mn5cs7g_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c3g62o31c5h2bs) If you’ve been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best ways you could possibly do it.

**And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get.**

You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C. for the parade is difficult.

I am honored to say that we will have several World War II veterans with us for this year’s parade... but I don’t know how many more years we’ll have that precious opportunity.

So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of the D-Day invasion and what might be the last chance these great men have to gather together, **I encourage you to help us honor them while we still have them with us.**

And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms.

Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country.
Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country.

_I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._

**Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please —[if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zptb9ao88lrktt8qft1q7brao799k0qjrusjh3vo_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c3g62o31c5h2bs)**
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...

* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

name: Blake Masters
subject: The mob came with torches and pitchforks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blake Masters for Congress
body:
My opponent JUST hit the airwaves with a fake news smear campaign against me.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zokq443ocgdo02r54bb17ulntk3d2sjgu510a30g_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c3g62o31cph2bs)
---
It's like Deja vu, Friend.

Last time, the Democrat Machine unloaded _$150 MILLION_ to bury my Senate campaign.

The DC Swamp told me to go home.

But I refused to sell my soul and let the likes of them determine the future of my country.

**That 's why I felt God call me to throw my name on the ballot once more -- this time in the MUST-WIN race for AZ-08.**

And let me tell you, the DC Swamp is _ENRAGED_ I didn't listen to them.

In fact, they're panicking because I'm surging in the polls.

Just this week, my primary opponent unleashed a barrage of FAKE NEWS ads in the district to slam the door shut on my campaign.

name: Gary Sinise
subject: The National Memorial Day Parade is back
body:
The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ...

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z67htipshgbliki0t75tsfsabnc7othai97vkep0_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c3g62o34cjh2bs)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here.

You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI NY— but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders.

**This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.**

The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of the D-Day invasion, the American Veterans Center is bringing the Parade BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as a T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country.

**[Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr3kudin4f54civolkil0ha8se5gebmou9th49uo_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c3g62o34cjh2bs)**
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqucgmlduiohrt7loet00hkbmgeu23allohvtm78_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c3g62o34cjh2bs)
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8rrie2fgagnfqnr6roakniqi4ros82tlqcnv9ng_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c3g62o34cjh2bs)
---

---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9pfrnp606aipmh352s00e3ql1egmmf0p5fti5r8_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c3g62o34cjh2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.
* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.
* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zql3r7qbnjps5mlvs5e1prhf31j9j1g3nloh54rg_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c3g62o34cjh2bs) If you’ve been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best ways you could possibly do it.

**And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get.**

You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C. for the parade is difficult.

I am honored to say that we will have several World War II veterans with us for this year’s parade... but I don’t know how many more years we’ll have that precious opportunity.

So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of the D-Day invasion and what might be the last chance these great men have to gather together, **I encourage you to help us honor them while we still have them with us.**

And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms.

Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country.
Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country.

_I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._

**Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please —[if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zogi5nqgulgcriq7af0n5cjdvqoe4ommbiq3th0g_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c3g62o34cjh2bs)**
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj6j8th0uklpaq836gv8m3molerrihnhvcjeuptg_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c3g62o34cjh2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9rgk8q0m0lufd305mcp3amd8544254nlmkgmf78_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c3g62o34cjh2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

ICYMI News
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

name: Hillsdale College via Trump News HQ
subject: Discover What They Don’t Want You to Know: The Great Reset
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znjrr672qce1a08lvppe54918se00jh32s1lcmmg_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c3g6eor2cph2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0kt8clf24mv5g164g0nsmk9eecmfpgtpecv8gcg_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c3g6eor2cph2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsf2fsekh81e25fjggd2so1q63eomviue5t5aas8_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c3g6eor2cph2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Hillsdale College via American Briefing
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zi179lpjb3e1345vk9il2ir945ilgslo66n9sb28_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c3g69ob2c3h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsc4grefrs4uaun99au1j2ik4a7nhphccavljaa0_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c3g69ob2c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2za0nbf2r3i0hb2fl34p2fgefgj70u58aqjhcjjq8_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c3g69ob2c3h2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Friend,

**URGENT: Biden’s new Executive Order 14019 will turn Federal government agencies to act as Biden’s personal “Get-Out-The-Vote” machine.**

While courts may take up the case, here’s what I fear the most...

Republicans in Congress do not have the willpower to stop this unprecedented and unconstitutional use of our government to interfere with our elections in 2024. Republicans are already behind the Democratic machine to turn out votes, and this will only increase their efforts.

No wonder Biden and his campaign are “increasingly confident” they will win despite bad polling and collapsing approval numbers.

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g. corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidate and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g. foreign corporations) are prohibited. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Ever wonder how transgender children’s books get into schools?
body:
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW8OdGTWrN)
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63215108:W8OdGTWrN:m:1:2625680565:09A36969F3479A6C2034A66DA1EE4D88:r "SkyTree Book
Fairs")

Friend ,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here's what we're up against.

These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We've censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material):

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63215108:W8OdGTWrN:m:1:2625680565:09A36969F3479A6C2034A66DA1EE4D88:r)[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63215108:W8OdGTWrN:m:1:2625680565:09A36969F3479A6C2034A66DA1EE4D88:r)

Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children.

**Here is the solution:**

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here's how you can help.

[I am asking for your urgent support to help SkyTree replace Scholastic in schools. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward Sky Tree? name: Coach
subject: Honoring their sacrifice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville Victory Fund
body:
This Memorial Day, we remember the patriots who made the ultimate sacrifice for us all.
| | | Peter, As we gather with family and friends this Memorial Day, we pause to honor the brave men and women who've made the ultimate sacrifice in service to our great nation. Their courage and dedication have safeguarded our freedoms and way of life. Freedom is not free. It is secured by the blood, sweat, and tears of patriots who’ve answered the call of duty, defending our country and its values with unwavering resolve. Today, we remember the cost of our liberty and the generations of soldiers who have stood on the front lines to protect it.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/01280ebcef9a89933947229f28c3afba/3a918216b7f01d70c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
We pay tribute to these fallen heroes and extend our deepest gratitude to their families and loved ones. Their legacy is one of honor, bravery and selflessness. Let us never forget those we’ve lost. Let us honor their memory and carry forward their spirit of patriotism and love for America. As we reflect on their sacrifice, let us renew our commitment to preserving the freedoms they fought to protect. God bless the fallen, their families and this great nation. -Coach
---

---

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g. foreign corporations) are prohibited. | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yHXChuBTW0SBENOFf-BRMw~~/AARclAA~~~) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

Larry P. Arnn

name: The Flyover
subject: Storms Kill 15, China Arms Robot Dog, and Skydivers Jump to Survive Crash
body:
Severe storms and tornadoes tore through Texas, Arkansas, and Oklahoma Sunday, [killing at least 15 people](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAUheGnwRsWvmBIBoYu3tK1o3UDl5gKTAQ0Vt6-cuduR_qGI_1ft_WGMcX98YmZbA9lRdfji9aZg-GgVjV4G4iA5EB2MpO-TFLoadiscpqQECV4pwhgBlDXgPNVkDbOwBAtCFBiBiMus1bTKJWZw0XLq8EAd5RMCfKxlzp-l7j3jUJ6lxfV0ZU8JLv1_mxMfjBYGCzHcYzu3nY62ukMlnOeQNg3qrz1UjP3uD-olp_GN8LOe6k7-kKNZ8qlRkzc45vBMlTrn0dMKTZtmBKPjDH9Hff_M7ws_AYAAP__ilthOw), injuring scores more, and cutting power to hundreds of thousands across the region.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2K4zAUhZ9G7mzkq5_rFCoCRrBFtt3SyNaVo0X-wZIT5u2HTKacac_5OHycf7fh5mKK6_zXLWRK2AY3lfigQdWANchBVt4EIiBRkWmx1V0ruG6ruxk1dggjYlDodOjA4yTRX4iC5FxRFQ1wkFwB8k5p2TZCogqdFhd0AUYnmOTkY9mO5v8W13KnkD62Bx3NtC1VMvdS9szElYFlYHc3U27O_UkprZTzC2Jgz6mejz2dud4zyHp15YULe7X2T89ED0pJqRjofI7RM9G7lKJbJzoWBno6c9kWGyl5wUT_Xvq2OJa3_JBPBpoWFxMTvd-fMaWYNTLJ51f4ZXuYX4ry86kPA58BAAD__zrweGY) | |
# MONDAY, MAY 27, 2024
---|---
**Happy Memorial Day**! On this date in 1941, British warships found and sank the mighty Bismarck, the pride of Adolf Hitler's navy. Johnny Horton's "Sink the Bismarck" became a hit song in 1960. ([See Video](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjz1rwzAUAH-NtMXoPX05g4ZCMXRwt9LRyNZTpCJHwVFs8u9LOne9g4P7HqfR55Kvl0-_kmuxTn5peadJn9CeUE2KBxeJkCQnBxZMD1IY4Mn5EKUwUZA9EwSPsOie_AxgdQBFimeHApXQaEWvjYJOKqtjb-TZ-oizl0wJCrnVrfup-doSxfKsO23dUldeXGrtdmfyjeHAcDiOo3vWR3vM9PIv4tuSmBx2Jt9H-IoLpg81jHxz4XbkUvLdWKbEZfW5_CXb_4O7w98AAAD__3j9UZI)) _The Flyover_ today and Tuesday will be a bit shorter than usual to give our busy writers a little more time to spend with their families this holiday weekend. We'll return to our normal edition on Wednesday. Have a great Memorial Day!
If you haven't subscribed to _The Flyover_ yet, you can do that here [with one click](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1ugzAQAOCnsbcg-_zL4KFSxFS6dkQGznCtwRFxqfr2VdUx2b_pe--HPlKmfXmLG4aayhCnSicO5gLuAnrQfA4JEVBxDNJJ66USVvI1mGSEl2MaPQIaMbejcSZi61v0YOLEKYAALQw44Y3VslHameStal1MMEbFtMCZajmaj0J7XTHln3Li0Uxl4zmstd7uTL0w6Bh0j4RB18eFplfaP_-M6pCp63z7ppzpbh3TYtki5X9rv-rG1FULfoTnhtfnAWeA3wAAAP__cWRcLw). Our sponsor today is [Upwellness](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2K4zAUhZ9G7mzkq5_rFCoCRrBFtt3SyNaVo0X-wZIT5u2HTKacac_5OHycf7fh5mKK6_zXLWRK2AY3lfigQdWANchBVt4EIiBRkWmx1V0ruG6ruxk1dggjYlDodOjA4yTRX4iC5FxRFQ1wkFwB8k5p2TZCogqdFhd0AUYnmOTkY9mO5v8W13KnkD62Bx3NtC1VMvdS9szElYFlYHc3U27O_UkprZTzC2Jgz6mejz2dud4zyHp15YULe7X2T89ED0pJqRjofI7RM9G7lKJbJzoWBno6c9kWGyl5wUT_Xvq2OJa3_JBPBpoWFxMTvd-fMaWYNTLJ51f4ZXuYX4ry86kPA58BAAD__zrweGY), offering natural solutions to joint pain.
|
---
## Storms Kill At Least 15
Severe storms and tornadoes tore through Texas, Arkansas, and Oklahoma Sunday, [killing at least 15 people](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAUheGnwRsWvmBIBoYu3tK1o3UDl5gKTAQ0Vt6-cuduR_qGI_1ft_WGMcX98YmZbA9lRdfji9aZg-GgVjV4G4iA5EB2MpO-TFLoadiscpqQECV4pwhgBlDXgPNVkDbOwBAtCFBiBiMus1bTKJWZw0XLq8EAd5RMCfKxlzp-l7j3jUJ6lxfV0ZU8JLv1_mxMfjBYGCzHcYzu3nY62ukMlnOeQNg3qrz1UjP3uD-olp_GN8LOe6k7-kKNZ8qlRkzc45vBMlTrn0dMKTZtmBKPjDH9Hff_M7ws_AYAAP__ilthOw), injuring scores more, and cutting power to hundreds of thousands across the region. A devastating twister struck a rural area near a trailer park in Cooke County, Texas, killing at least seven, including two children. The storm also destroyed a truck stop where people sought shelter in a restroom. [Photos and video are here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L_OnDAQBPCnMd2ejP9xFC7S0H1pU6I9sz6cGBvhPS739hGpv26kkX7SzK-v-QtTTuX5EzfyHOuMgdNJswU1gDKz6RYfiRTpjnw_9O7ea-n6bvW0GK0pYAijsxh6tI84jo7GAe_SRN0lr6Qy0qpB3q0z_U2bwca70-OAUT1QCyNpSVyP2--aCq8U86eedNxC3brsV-a9Cf1DqEmoKaxYCmVd6vvqhZouXahJ2is7oaYNW4OA7YWZP0AnFYaFQsaDFkCGE3OmD5yJ3sD0Fxvw8Qp_oHHd4bUDV-itBD5w32mBVOCoNUKoOePe6CLaSjnDExs0Rk61CDV1h1_2d8o5NTcII58bpvx_A3__6OnVvwAAAP__GqR6Eg) At least five others were [killed in Arkansas and two in Oklahoma](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj71uwyAYAJ8Gtljw8ecMDF28pWtHC8NHQoWNhZFx375K524nnXTSfT3mh0s5bc9Pt6JtsczOt3TirG5gbiBnSYONiICCouWG65ELpjl9WdBSyZEhY0JhQOXHqBa4G81DDBGQJgsMJFNg2Ki05IOQRsVRi7txERYniGQYUit1-C5pay-M-aecWAdfVprtq7X9IOKDwERg6r0Py-LfjsC0YT8ITK625DO-0V_XtfOuEWqh1Ya9p5zToQ2R7Lm6lP-q7f_H08JvAAAA__9VNlMy). Farther east, the severe weather caused a race delay and the evacuation of 125,000 attendees at the Indianapolis 500 on Sunday.
## CNN Primetime Ratings Sink to 33-Year Low
CNN recorded its [lowest primetime ratings](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2O6yAUhJ8Gd0RwAOMUFLehy223tFhzSM4uP5ZBifL2K2-93UgzGn36Pm7rLVCmev8fCrqR2hq2QU9cDQfLQa96ii4hAqoJnbRyXqQSs5weTphFL0ZFiYgQrNImWqVgM1qgStsykQMBWhiwYjGzlhelrUnLrK42JPgMimmBkUY7Ll-N6nhgyu_2xOOytTJl9xhj70z9Y-AZ-PreWx9nxcCfxwy8MGcGBr5gpMDAb7Xyc9d5bi_sgx9hYOQvxG9Ole8HFRxUkHeqG3J5vUoGfjpc3F-UM_XZMi3uJVD-pRh_O3k6-AkAAP__ZYlhRQ) since 1991 among the most valuable viewers aged 25-54. Only 83,000 watched in primetime in the week ending May 19. That contrasts with [186,000 for Fox News](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL3O3CAQAJ8Gd2uZBf9cQZGvcPdFSnWlxdnLeRPAFnBG9_bRpU430jSjuX8v35Y9x-dPG8gUdyx2LXzR0gOOgHrRzWYcEZJqyMhRDpNU3SCb3ZCmScv-8RhG63rp-k1PdMNV3YaJrHING-xQdz2O3dQPWrZKj72bBnUbrcOHVUJ3tHE5Uvv74Fh2cv59XJTa9QiNN3spZxbqh8BZ4FxrbUOOHydwpgivLHAul8A5Uv3wGiNkOBMHKhwIPEd6nbBzybBxDtbDxVQp5Z1P8EeFjfLJhSBShfeR_sAFJb3CCSWx9QJnm-DrS4Zf5O9NMttZ2XvOwyh09wyW_b_S8v9vl8G_AQAA__-_6XI5) and 111,000 for second-place MSNBC. CNN also suffered in total viewership for the week, attracting 494,000 viewers compared to 2 million for Fox. Analysts say CNN's new boss, former BBC chief Mark Thompson, is searching for a strategy. Last week, he unveiled a plan to focus on CNN "verticals" such as culture and lifestyle with less focus on political news. _While CNN's ratings are tanking, the Flyover continues to grow. clean_body: Severe storms and tornadoes tore through Texas, Arkansas, and Oklahoma Sunday, , injuring scores more, and cutting power to hundreds of thousands across the region. | | | | | | MONDAY, MAY 27, 2024 ---|--- Happy Memorial Day! On this date in 1941, British warships found and sank the mighty Bismarck, the pride of Adolf Hitler's navy. Johnny Horton's "Sink the Bismarck" became a hit song in 1960. () The Flyover today and Tuesday will be a bit shorter than usual to give our busy writers a little more time to spend with their families this holiday weekend. We'll return to our normal edition on Wednesday. Have a great Memorial Day! If you haven't subscribed to The Flyover yet, you can do that here . Our sponsor today is , offering natural solutions to joint pain. | Storms Kill At Least 15 Severe storms and tornadoes tore through Texas, Arkansas, and Oklahoma Sunday, , injuring scores more, and cutting power to hundreds of thousands across the region. A devastating twister struck a rural area near a trailer park in Cooke County, Texas, killing at least seven, including two children. The storm also destroyed a truck stop where people sought shelter in a restroom. At least five others were . Farther east, the severe weather caused a race delay and the evacuation of 125,000 attendees at the Indianapolis 500 on Sunday. CNN Primetime Ratings Sink to 33-Year Low CNN recorded its since 1991 among the most valuable viewers aged 25-54. Only 83,000 watched in primetime in the week ending May 19. That contrasts with and 111,000 for second-place MSNBC. CNN also suffered in total viewership for the week, attracting 494,000 viewers compared to 2 million for Fox. Analysts say CNN's new boss, former BBC chief Mark Thompson, is searching for a strategy. Last week, he unveiled a plan to focus on CNN "verticals" such as culture and lifestyle with less focus on political news. While CNN's ratings are tanking, the Flyover continues to grow. Fellow American, It's Gary Sinise here.

You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI NY-- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders.

**This year, I 'm honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.**

The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of the D-Day invasion, the American Veterans Center is bringing the Parade BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as a T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country.

**[Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9QUxMNDk2OTcifQ/32IgHvyJywo5k0LzOYoG4A)**
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9QUxMNDk2OTcifQ/Wh1PNsfQhjRTlDfTFqTvlw)
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9QUxMNDk2OTcifQ/ekCeT1vtdDG2B5i6X7Ou3Q)
---

---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9QUxMNDk2OTcifQ/XHaLPB5ZVUmvXzqMZcm1yw)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.
* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.
* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9QUxMNDk2OTcifQ/F6GMPs4dFEPbzmMqqdc18Q) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best ways you could possibly do it.

**And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get.**

You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C. for the parade is difficult.

I am honored to say that we will have several World War II veterans with us for this year's parade... but I don't know how many more years we'll have that precious opportunity.

So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of the D-Day invasion and what might be the last chance these great men have to gather together, **I encourage you to help us honor them while we still have them with us.**

And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day -- this year and every year -- please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms.

Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country.
Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country.

_I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._

**Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please -- [if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9QUxMNDk2OTcifQ/TJctDKHXkgnB3xGYuFHawQ)**
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9QUxMNDk2OTcifQ/hgqdz8vIEqKilNQ20LKXWA)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9QUxMNDk2OTcifQ/ScpYUrQ85R8hQHXW7Cgeag)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---
P.O. Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.libertyledger.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MTQ4LWVjZjUzZmFhMjBjZTRiMGNhYTU4NjU2Njg4NGU0ODNhIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/SavcpTfyY1JMR6m4HedwGw) to unsubscribe.

name: Emily Hall
subject: Send a Note of Encouragement to Missionaries Today!
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs-C7ITWNk

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os-C7ITWNk

Dear
Friend,

I'm
grateful to connect with you today and share an opportunity to
impact the lives of our courageous missionaries serving in remote
and challenging regions around the world.

In the
farthest corners of the globe, these dedicated men, women, and
families are sacrificing their comfort, security, and personal
aspirations to bring the hope and transformative message of
salvation to those who have never heard it before. With
unwavering faith, they face incredible trials, enduring
isolation, and even risking their safety to fulfill the calling
placed upon their lives.

Yet, even
people with the strongest commitment to their missionary calling
can sometimes grow weary and feel discouraged. That's where you
come in. I firmly believe that God can use your words of
encouragement to reassure our missionaries that He is with them,
strengthening them to press on.

Would you
take a moment to write a note of encouragement to one of our
missionaries serving in the field? Your notes of encouragement
can be an instrument of hope God uses to remind them that they
are not alone as they shine the light of the gospel in the
darkest corners of the world.

Will you
help encourage a missionary serving in the field?
Your
message can be a lifeline, assuring them that their sacrifices
are seen and deeply appreciated.

To send
your note of encouragement, I invite you to fill out the secure
form in this link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63215054:s-C7ITWNk:m:3:2627245898:33CFACA8B3A7A3EB9A7103CF23E926B5:r

Thank you
for your commitment to the Great Commission. Your support and
prayers are invaluable in reaching those who have yet to
experience the life-changing power of the gospel.

We are
deeply grateful for your partnership in advancing the Kingdom of
God.

In
Christ,

Emily
Hall
Prayer
Content Specialist
IMB
Prayer Office

International Mission Board | 3806 Monument Ave. Richmond, VA
23230 | (804) 353-0515

body:
