name: Colonel Johann Clendenin
subject: Honoring our veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands
body:
A Memorial Day message from Colonel Johann Clendenin of St Croix | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/529d8f3dc90a/honoring-our-veterans?e=d30db4cde8)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | | Memorial Day, which has long been set aside for paying tribute to those who lost their lives in war, shall henceforth be dedicated also as a day for nation-wide prayer for permanent peace.

Today, we honor the brave men and women who have made the ultimate sacrifice in defense of our nation and its values. We remember their courage, their selflessness, and their unwavering commitment to freedom.

As Republicans, we are proud to uphold the principles of liberty, justice, and equality that our fallen heroes fought to protect. We recognize the sacrifices made by their families and loved ones, and we pledge to continue their legacy by promoting a strong national defense, supporting our veterans, and upholding the Constitution.

Let us take a moment to reflect on the true meaning of Memorial Day. Let us honor the memories of those who have given their last full measure of devotion. And let us recommit ourselves to the values that have made America the greatest nation on earth.

Thank you to all who have served, and may God bless the United States of America.

**Colonel Johann Clendenin
National Committeeman**
---

name: TIED! (via UD)
subject: our jaws just DROPPED!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:

Peter, We wanted to share a few important updates on our progress:
* So far, **more than 1.8 million people** have contributed to build this campaign.
* That includes thousands of people from your area.
* As of yesterday, we have received more than 4.9 million contributions -- that's incredible!

But here's the truth: Even though we’re gaining momentum every quarter and raising historic numbers from small-dollar grassroots donors, we were outraised by Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies last quarter -- _and_ their big bucks from Wall Street billionaires. clean_body: Here’s the truth, Peter. | | | Peter, We wanted to share a few important updates on our progress: So far, more than 1.8 million people have contributed to build this campaign. That includes thousands of people from your area. As of yesterday, we have received more than 4.9 million contributions -- that's incredible! But here's the truth: Even though we’re gaining momentum every quarter and raising historic numbers from small-dollar grassroots donors, we were outraised by Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies last quarter -- and their big bucks from Wall Street billionaires. So today we have to ask: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | President Biden and Vice President Harris are very proud of the way we're funding this campaign -- and we hope you are too. We are proving that an army of grassroots supporters coming together is more powerful than a handful of wealthy campaign contributors. And that’s priceless. Thank you for adding your contribution today. Keep the faith, Team Biden-Harris

body:
| | |
---
Dear Friend,
---
Yesterday, before our Kingdom to the Capitol revival in Maine, I came across this memorial and stirred up a deep level of gratitude for both our men and women in uniform and the generations who served this nation before them. On this Memorial Day, it's good to reflect on the fact that we live in the greatest nation in history, defended by the most powerful in history, but we cannot let the size and scope of our military distract from the fact that the freedoms we enjoy today have been bought and paid for by generations of service members.
---

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

body:
| | | | [_View in browser_](https://837e3.r.ah.d.sendibm5.com/mk/mr/sh/1t6AVsd2XFnIGLoScO4pO5CzFAFC20/8KigQ8AgGCf1)
---
| | | | |
## Honoring our fallen HEROES!
---
On Memorial Day, we come together as a nation to honor and remember the courageous men and women who have made the ultimate sacrifice in service to our country. This day holds deep significance as we reflect on the selfless contributions of our military members and pay tribute to their enduring legacy. It serves as a poignant reminder of the high price that has been paid for the freedoms we cherish and enjoy today. Memorial Day is a time to pause and acknowledge the bravery and valor exhibited by our fallen heroes. Their unwavering dedication and commitment to upholding our nation's values are truly commendable. As we gather to commemorate their sacrifices, we are reminded of the profound impact that their actions have had on shaping our society. It is essential that we never forget the true meaning of Memorial Day and the profound significance it holds in our hearts. This day is a solemn reminder of the sacrifices made by those who have served and protected our country. Their courage and resilience continue to inspire future generations to uphold the values of freedom and democracy. Let us take this opportunity to express our gratitude and appreciation for the sacrifices made by our military members. Their selfless acts of courage and valor deserve our utmost respect and admiration. May we always remember and honor the heroes who have given their all for the greater good of our nation.
|
---
**🌟Why Support Our Campaign? 🌟** 👓Vision for a Stronger America: Our vision revolves around a more resilient and cohesive America that caters to all individuals. We are dedicated to addressing crucial societal issues such as healthcare, education, climate change, and social equity. 🤝Inclusivity and Unity: We are firm believers in the power of our differences and our capacity to unite as a country. Our focus is on fostering harmony, cooperation, and joint efforts to construct a more promising tomorrow for everyone. 👔Proven Leadership: With a proven history of successful leadership and a profound comprehension of the obstacles our nation is currently facing, I am prepared to assume control and steer us towards a brighter tomorrow. **🌟How Can You Help?🌟** Your support is crucial to our campaign's success. Every dollar counts and brings us one step closer to our shared vision of a stronger, more united America. Here's how you can make a difference: 💰Donate: Your kind donations will assist us in reaching out to voters, conducting impactful campaigns, and spreading our message of optimism and advancement. 🗣Spread the Word: Share our campaign with your friends, family, and colleagues. By working together, we can create a grassroots movement that has the power to alter the course of history. 🙋♂️🙋♀️Volunteer: Join our team of committed volunteers who are dedicated to bringing our vision to life. Your expertise and time are extremely valuable to us. Together, we can create a brighter, more inclusive, and prosperous future for all Americans. Your support is not just an investment in our campaign; it's an investment in the future of our district. 🙏Thank you for believing in this vision and for being a part of the movement. Together, we can make history. Donate today and help us build a better tomorrow!
| [ DONATE TODAY](https://837e3.r.ah.d.sendibm5.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsDg0mAofabMdU5H7ZLxiu/aGsO1yOmusyu)

name: Diane Sare
subject: Can There Be a Memorial Day if No One Survives to Remember?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sare for Senate
body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240527_memorial_day&n=1)
---
Friend -- _A return to our actually founding constitutional principles, minus the elected opportunists’ errors respecting the follies of so-called “popular opinions,” were urgently needed, right now. Otherwise survival, if still possible, were nonetheless in doubt presently._ -Lyndon laRouche, May 9, 2014 May 27, 2024 — Three days ago, Ukrainian drones struck the Armavir Radar Station in Russia’s Krasnodar Krai region, hundreds of miles inside Russia’s border with Ukraine. This station is a critical component of Russia’s early warning radar system, able to detect incoming missiles from thousands of miles away. As of this moment the extent of the damage is not clear, but what is clear is that such an attack can only be perceived as an escalation in the Anglo-American delusional attempt to “weaken Russia,” which will be spun to inflame the insane opinion of some American, British and NATO armchair generals that a nuclear war against Russia could be won. As opposed to taking your opinion from the lying American news media, think for yourself: how would Russia be likely to interpret such a move? How many of your neighbors are aware that Russia has recently been performing military drills involving the use of “tactical” nuclear weapons? Is any one of the current pack of leading American presidential candidates aware of the danger we are in? Certainly the dementia-suffering Joe Biden is not, and the others have been ominously silent on this most important topic of our future existence. As an independent candidate for U.S. Senate in New York who worked for three decades with American WWII veteran and statesman Lyndon LaRouche, I call on my fellow Americans to remember and uphold the intention of our Republic’s greatest leaders. Join me in halting this march to self-annihilation. The first Memorial Day was held a few years after President Abraham Lincoln’s defeat of the slave-holding British-directed Confederacy, which sought to destroy our union. Although Lincoln was assassinated just days after the Confederate surrender at Appomattox, our national culture was such that the desire for “perfecting our Union” did not die with him, but was guarded by thousands of capable leaders, including General, and later President, Ulysses S. Grant, Maj. General Joshua Lawrence Chamberlain, Frederick Douglass, and countless others. The original Memorial Day in 1868 was called “Decoration Day,” a day in which to strew flowers and place flags upon the countless graves “in every city, village, and hamlet churchyard” honoring those “heroic dead who made their breasts a barricade between our country and its foes.” Commander John Logan further stated, “Let no vandalism of avarice or neglect, no ravages of time, testify to the present or to the coming generations that we have forgotten, as a people, the cost of a free and undivided republic.” One year later, in June of 1869, the National Peace Jubilee was held in Boston, involving a chorus of 10,000 voices from across the nation in a massive structure built for the occasion. Between those two events, the transcontinental railroad, a visionary project created by the slain president, was completed with the driving in of the “Golden Spike” in Utah. As opposed to focusing on our differences and arguing over petty issues which will mean nothing if the world plunges into the abyss of nuclear war, let us take a moment this Memorial Day to reflect on what we owe to our fallen comrades who acted in good faith out of love for our nation, even if in the wars since 1945 that good faith was horribly abused by evil policymakers. Let us imagine the future through their eyes. The principles expressed in our Declaration of Independence are true, not because they are written there, but because the writers of that document understood that human beings embody a universal quality of genius, which is endowed upon each of us equally. The purpose of government is to protect that potential by allowing a free discourse of ideas among an educated citizenry, and maintaining a certain standard of basic physical infrastructure, making it possible for people to think, as opposed to clawing at the dust for mere survival. This is why the Transcontinental Railroad was a crucial component of keeping the peace. Thanks in part to the decades-long efforts of Lyndon LaRouche and his widow, Schiller Institute founder Helga Zepp-LaRouche, a new ordering principle is emerging on the planet, reflecting certain principles we would call “American,” but due to the current depravity of the Washington and Wall Street elites, not led or even joined by the United States. This is the process evident in the BRICS-plus group of nations, and China’s Belt and Road Initiative, which has grown to involve over 150 nations. Contrary to the collapsing trajectory of the so-called “civilized” NATO block, the nations of the BRICS (Brazil, Russia, China, India, South Africa) axis are moving to strengthen regional cooperation on projects of “connectivity” and economic growth. These projects involve major rail and maritime transport corridors, connecting new regions of economic growth, as well as joint space exploration and groundbreaking research on nuclear fission and fusion power development. It is this process which the perverted warmongers of the west seek to stop, even at the risk of unleashing thermonuclear war, which some among them are deluded enough to believe is survivable. My campaign is dedicated to liberating our nation from the degraded cultural outlook of the fascist “Congress for Cultural Freedom,” of London’s Tavistock Institute, Hollywood, and the CIA; putting Wall Street through a long overdue bankruptcy reorganization; and returning to the principles expressed by our first Treasury Secretary Alexander Hamilton, as advanced and developed by Lyndon LaRouche in his many policy papers and economic development proposals. Take a moment this Memorial Day to imagine the world that you would want your great grandchildren to inhabit three generations from now. Do you think that other people in remote lands want a similar future for their children generations from now? We Americans have an important responsibility in creating this world. It starts today, not on November 5.
* * *

clean_body: | | Friend -- A return to our actually founding constitutional principles, minus the elected opportunists’ errors respecting the follies of so-called “popular opinions,” were urgently needed, right now. Otherwise survival, if still possible, were nonetheless in doubt presently. -Lyndon laRouche, May 9, 2014 May 27, 2024 — Three days ago, Ukrainian drones struck the Armavir Radar Station in Russia’s Krasnodar Krai region, hundreds of miles inside Russia’s border with Ukraine. This station is a critical component of Russia’s early warning radar system, able to detect incoming missiles from thousands of miles away. As of this moment the extent of the damage is not clear, but what is clear is that such an attack can only be perceived as an escalation in the Anglo-American delusional attempt to “weaken Russia,” which will be spun to inflame the insane opinion of some American, British and NATO armchair generals that a nuclear war against Russia could be won. As opposed to taking your opinion from the lying American news media, think for yourself: how would Russia be likely to interpret such a move? How many of your neighbors are aware that Russia has recently been performing military drills involving the use of “tactical” nuclear weapons? Is any one of the current pack of leading American presidential candidates aware of the danger we are in? Certainly the dementia-suffering Joe Biden is not, and the others have been ominously silent on this most important topic of our future existence. As an independent candidate for U.S. Senate in New York who worked for three decades with American WWII veteran and statesman Lyndon LaRouche, I call on my fellow Americans to remember and uphold the intention of our Republic’s greatest leaders. Join me in halting this march to self-annihilation. The first Memorial Day was held a few years after President Abraham Lincoln’s defeat of the slave-holding British-directed Confederacy, which sought to destroy our union. Although Lincoln was assassinated just days after the Confederate surrender at Appomattox, our national culture was such that the desire for “perfecting our Union” did not die with him, but was guarded by thousands of capable leaders, including General, and later President, Ulysses S. Grant, Maj. General Joshua Lawrence Chamberlain, Frederick Douglass, and countless others. The original Memorial Day in 1868 was called “Decoration Day,” a day in which to strew flowers and place flags upon the countless graves “in every city, village, and hamlet churchyard” honoring those “heroic dead who made their breasts a barricade between our country and its foes.” Commander John Logan further stated, “Let no vandalism of avarice or neglect, no ravages of time, testify to the present or to the coming generations that we have forgotten, as a people, the cost of a free and undivided republic.” One year later, in June of 1869, the National Peace Jubilee was held in Boston, involving a chorus of 10,000 voices from across the nation in a massive structure built for the occasion. Between those two events, the transcontinental railroad, a visionary project created by the slain president, was completed with the driving in of the “Golden Spike” in Utah. As opposed to focusing on our differences and arguing over petty issues which will mean nothing if the world plunges into the abyss of nuclear war, let us take a moment this Memorial Day to reflect on what we owe to our fallen comrades who acted in good faith out of love for our nation, even if in the wars since 1945 that good faith was horribly abused by evil policymakers. Let us imagine the future through their eyes. The principles expressed in our Declaration of Independence are true, not because they are written there, but because the writers of that document understood that human beings embody a universal quality of genius, which is endowed upon each of us equally. The purpose of government is to protect that potential by allowing a free discourse of ideas among an educated citizenry, and maintaining a certain standard of basic physical infrastructure, making it possible for people to think, as opposed to clawing at the dust for mere survival. This is why the Transcontinental Railroad was a crucial component of keeping the peace. Thanks in part to the decades-long efforts of Lyndon LaRouche and his widow, Schiller Institute founder Helga Zepp-LaRouche, a new ordering principle is emerging on the planet, reflecting certain principles we would call “American,” but due to the current depravity of the Washington and Wall Street elites, not led or even joined by the United States. This is the process evident in the BRICS-plus group of nations, and China’s Belt and Road Initiative, which has grown to involve over 150 nations. Contrary to the collapsing trajectory of the so-called “civilized” NATO block, the nations of the BRICS (Brazil, Russia, China, India, South Africa) axis are moving to strengthen regional cooperation on projects of “connectivity” and economic growth. These projects involve major rail and maritime transport corridors, connecting new regions of economic growth, as well as joint space exploration and groundbreaking research on nuclear fission and fusion power development. It is this process which the perverted warmongers of the west seek to stop, even at the risk of unleashing thermonuclear war, which some among them are deluded enough to believe is survivable. My campaign is dedicated to liberating our nation from the degraded cultural outlook of the fascist “Congress for Cultural Freedom,” of London’s Tavistock Institute, Hollywood, and the CIA; putting Wall Street through a long overdue bankruptcy reorganization; and returning to the principles expressed by our first Treasury Secretary Alexander Hamilton, as advanced and developed by Lyndon LaRouche in his many policy papers and economic development proposals. Take a moment this Memorial Day to imagine the world that you would want your great grandchildren to inhabit three generations from now. Do you think that other people in remote lands want a similar future for their children generations from now? We Americans have an important responsibility in creating this world. It starts today, not on November 5. | "DONATE" \--Diane | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Sare for Senate

name: Dawn Flippo
subject: SEAL PAC Endorses David Flippo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee To Elect David Flippo]( "Paid for by The Committee To Elect David Flippo")
body:
While John Lee attacks Veterans, we rally together |
---
| | Dear Peter,

I am reaching out with more uplifting news that fills our hearts with pride and strengthens our campaign as we continue to advocate for strong, principled leadership. [I am thrilled to announce that David has received the official endorsement of SEAL PAC](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=003d1c3f36&e=273c9a71fb), an organization committed to electing combat veterans who embody courage, integrity, and leadership.

SEAL PAC recognizes David's unwavering dedication to our nation, both in his military service and his continued efforts to serve our community. As a retired Air Force lieutenant colonel who led troops in combat, David's profound understanding of the challenges faced by our military and veterans resonates deeply with their mission. This endorsement is a powerful affirmation of his commitment to protecting our freedoms and ensuring the safety and prosperity of all Americans.

[The unwarranted attacks on David’s character and service by our opponent only make endorsements like this one even more significant.](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=b18db0729b&e=273c9a71fb) They remind us of the respect and trust that David has earned from those who understand what true leadership looks like. It also underscores the necessity of having leaders like David, who are tested and proven, ready to make the tough decisions that safeguard our nation.

Your overwhelming support has been our stronghold. As we receive endorsements from respected organizations like SEAL PAC, we are reminded of the impact our united front can have. This is not just a campaign; it's a movement to bring honor, integrity, and true American values back to our representation in Congress.

[We need your continued enthusiasm and support as we approach the election. Every contribution and every hour volunteered makes a significant difference in our journey together. Let's keep the momentum going and ensure that our voices are heard loud and clear in Washington.](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=0e21da80a3&e=273c9a71fb)

Thank you for standing with David, with me, and with all who believe in a future secured not by mere promises, but by the proven honor and valor of a true American leader.
---
| | With all my gratitude,
---
| Dawn Flippo
[**ElectDavidFlippo.com**](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=6ba3feea00&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | | | | | | [](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=caf4bda6cc&e=273c9a71fb)
---

clean_body: While John Lee attacks Veterans, we rally together | | | Dear Peter, I am reaching out with more uplifting news that fills our hearts with pride and strengthens our campaign as we continue to advocate for strong, principled leadership. , an organization committed to electing combat veterans who embody courage, integrity, and leadership. SEAL PAC recognizes David's unwavering dedication to our nation, both in his military service and his continued efforts to serve our community. As a retired Air Force lieutenant colonel who led troops in combat, David's profound understanding of the challenges faced by our military and veterans resonates deeply with their mission. This endorsement is a powerful affirmation of his commitment to protecting our freedoms and ensuring the safety and prosperity of all Americans. They remind us of the respect and trust that David has earned from those who understand what true leadership looks like. It also underscores the necessity of having leaders like David, who are tested and proven, ready to make the tough decisions that safeguard our nation. Your overwhelming support has been our stronghold. As we receive endorsements from respected organizations like SEAL PAC, we are reminded of the impact our united front can have. This is not just a campaign; it's a movement to bring honor, integrity, and true American values back to our representation in Congress. Thank you for standing with David, with me, and with all who believe in a future secured not by mere promises, but by the proven honor and valor of a true American leader. | | With all my gratitude, | Dawn Flippo | | | | | | | | | | | | "Paid for by The Committee To Elect David Flippo" | | Copyright © 2024 Committee To Elect David Flippo, All rights reserved.

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Kennedy Is Fearless
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Restoring our government to where it serves you will be our highest priority!

|
---
| | | [Restoring our government to where it serves you will be our highest priority!](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=deep_state_5_26_24_nd1_rs&n=1)

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=deep_state_5_26_24_nd1_rs&n=2)
|
---
Dear Peter,
Our Federal Government bureaucracy — sometimes called the Deep State — has been corrupted at the highest levels and it needs to be cleaned up.
That’s what President Trump was talking about when he said “Drain the Swamp.” But he didn’t know how. Instead he filled his administration with swamp creatures.
President Biden won’t do it either. Not only won’t they, but it seems they fear the Deep State.
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. the only candidate for President who knows exactly how to clean up the Deep State and he is the only candidate who is not afraid to clean up the Deep State.
He knows exactly what to do. He will do it one agency at a time. He has sued multiple government agencies and knows the players and the profiteers who have corrupted these agencies.
We will stop the profiteering (like royalties paid to NIH employees) and close the revolving doors that put corporate capture on steroids. We will clean house at the highest level, removing appointees and employees who have corrupted their agencies and no longer believe in our democratic institutions or the principles of our great country.
We will bring the government and its agencies back to their original purpose and culture of serving the public interest ... of serving you.
As President, he will make sure the federal government serves the American people, not the other way around. With your support we will restore our government to where it works for the American people... The future of our great country depends on it.
This election is critical, and we need your help to get this done. Restoring our government to where it _serves you_ will be our highest priority!
[To do this, Team Kennedy needs your help and support. Please donate what you can, be it $5, $10, $25, whatever you can afford so we can continue to get our message out.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=deep_state_5_26_24_nd1_rs&n=3)

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Memorial Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Peter — Memorial Day always makes me think about the people I served with in Iraq and Afghanistan — some of America's best — and how we can honor them.
**Please let me explain.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/51028?refcode=em20240527-5611&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5611%2E614464%2EGIqq90)
For the last two decades, corrupt politicians wasted $6.4 trillion and an entire generation of America’s best on pointless forever wars — sending soldiers like me and everyone else on doomed missions to build up countries like Iraq and Afghanistan while our communities back home crumbled.
While we fought and died to keep terrorism out of our own country, our politicians let domestic terrorists run rampant — plaguing our country with gun violence and turning elementary schools and grocery stores into war zones.
And now, those same war-hungry crooks like Josh Hawley, who dumped trillions into nation-building abroad, lined the pockets of their defense contractor donors, and let us fight and die in these pointless wars are telling us we can’t “afford” to invest in our people and communities here at home.
**We can’t let these lying elites continue calling the shots. That’s why I’m running for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.**
Everyday Missourians — people who know how to take care of each other — should be calling the shots in our country, not corrupt politicians and ultra-wealthy elites who rarely send their kids to die in war.
Together, we can end the war-hungry defense lobby hellbent on sending our troops back to the battlefield and make war profiteering a federal crime. We can stand up for every veteran and family who paid the ultimate sacrifice. And we can finally make investments and build up our communities back home.
Thanks for hearing me out and for being on this team.
Hope you’re having a good Memorial Day,
Lucas
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/51028?refcode=em20240527-5611&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5611%2E614464%2EGIqq90)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
---|---|---
Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=5611%2E614464%2EGIqq90). name: Brian
subject: thought this was cool
body:
|
---
| | Take a look at this...

I'm truly heartened by the way Nampa has come together, reflecting the strength and dedication of our community.

Delving into the voter data from District 13's precincts, the message is clear. Our community understands the critical issues at stake and has shown resounding support for our shared values. I’m honored to have earned your trust in nearly all precincts, with only one narrowly missing the mark.

[](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=6a8decc454&e=dea908e0fe)

This robust support reinforces our commitment to Nampa's principles.

Source: [https://results.voteidaho.gov/republican-legislative.html](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=7860b2790a&e=dea908e0fe "source")

Cheers,

Brian
Nampa's Conservative Senator
District 13

**P.S.** Today, let's remember those who fought and gave everything so we could live freely. Their ultimate sacrifices allow us to enjoy the liberties and safety we often take for granted.

\---

1) To make sure you keep getting these emails, please add [blforidaho@gmail.com](mailto:blforidaho@gmail.com) to your address book or whitelist me.

3) My postal address: PO Box 3753, Nampa, ID 83653-3753

clean_body: If we don’t reach our end-of-month fundraising goal, we may be forced to re-strategize our plan for 2024. We simply cannot let that happen, which is why we’re turning to you. | | | | | ---|--- Our end-of-month goal is only 4 days away, and we’re pacing extremely behind our May fundraising goal. $200,000. That’s how much money we need to raise before Friday’s end-of-month deadline. If we slip up again and miss our end-of-month goal like we did in April, we may need to pull back our planned investments for 2024. This would cut back on critical funding that allows our party to... ✖️ Strategize with our candidates in these final months ✖️ Mobilize resources to push our state Democrats across the finish line ✖️ Invest in pivotal races to ensure every vote counts ✖️ Engage voters through door-knocking and phone banking We’re only asking because you’ve witnessed how powerful of an impact this movement can have when we come together. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Together, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Pledge Against Woke Curriculum in K-12 Schools
body:
I’m reaching out today to express my deep concern regarding the introduction of woke curriculum in K-12 schools across our nation and ask for your help to put a stop to it. | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=c4eec50d78984ef6bdd0f2e9cb26023d&_t=nDDUz35lCwRWNzCKqqMBzROBN53_sE5tuXMI3v_XWNJXnTr8NRVApvlbF2AkH_jG320NeF1V8YHi7Avb11gX8q4X5H9L1kKWIM42tlg0t1k%3D)_

| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c4eec50d78984ef6bdd0f2e9cb26023d&_e=4_23WpkzPwqJxShgmgeteoWQ_4R38hQ9qYA7GTDlOyIXcMypstIJRmSCnOb8RYpWRv-wFNSTR7nDi7cIfW-JzWB1cLU-JItJHrXQE9sY8HxHrBcCz68urUegR5qjA0McdQuo2ZupfLSSNxVl_aC4Y6_ekXPOu4YxSLB5JWvjtRkd8ffYjCiT0u1707mWkvX1wQLsqtm_y1d4gpaZzuIAm9JEIhYYFUbcHzH_ddHq30N1avlwaPqCk-z0JDEdiK5RKWcMzE8kzJ23rao938nxx4U1ENgXQOmdR7KyHiH1EUkxroaiEnDt5KOhjTTf_GD6BelHeAHspFbuXLEOBYAA1DoO6FbgUKMaRh5LQF8hwX5YI0Y1wCU8m0_nxzs040TijNfuRNkRuhboCshUAwSckTa_G3P-D6txKanfxdY9Nnc%3D)
---
| [Click Here to Sign the Pledge Against Woke Curriculum in K-12 Schools](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c4eec50d78984ef6bdd0f2e9cb26023d&_e=4_23WpkzPwqJxShgmgeteoWQ_4R38hQ9qYA7GTDlOyIXcMypstIJRmSCnOb8RYpWRv-wFNSTR7nDi7cIfW-JzWB1cLU-JItJHrXQE9sY8HxHrBcCz68urUegR5qjA0McdQuo2ZupfLSSNxVl_aC4Y6_ekXPOu4YxSLB5JWvjtRkd8ffYjCiT0u1707mWkvX1wQLsqtm_y1d4gpaZzuIAm9JEIhYYFUbcHzH_ddHq30N1avlwaPqCk-z0JDEdiK5RKWcMzE8kzJ23rao938nxx5HY_gVY0xgHrR7tnM7WanHoBva9Ho65D5_RM1dpG0-B9IMmfRH4ZT933H7Vhe47guGvLS4a8HMZOVa4-PrBkJhmFaGdXZ1qYga8hbdaCYmCTdD1ylpFFU31XIEqR5Mu9o9jsnj0jUM-deJVst1UZXI%3D)
Dear Fellow Patriot,

I'm reaching out today to express my deep concern regarding the introduction of woke curriculum in K-12 schools across our nation and ask for your help to [put a stop to it.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c4eec50d78984ef6bdd0f2e9cb26023d&_e=4_23WpkzPwqJxShgmgeteoWQ_4R38hQ9qYA7GTDlOyIXcMypstIJRmSCnOb8RYpWRv-wFNSTR7nDi7cIfW-JzWB1cLU-JItJHrXQE9sY8HxHrBcCz68urUegR5qjA0McdQuo2ZupfLSSNxVl_aC4Y6_ekXPOu4YxSLB5JWvjtRkd8ffYjCiT0u1707mWkvX1wQLsqtm_y1d4gpaZzuIAm9JEIhYYFUbcHzH_ddHq30N1avlwaPqCk-z0JDEdiK5RKWcMzE8kzJ23rao938nxx3_k1yo8hj2EMguDITfzdEYnNaAD84x8-yOEvbN8fRgzo8Vw8Cuh_VH54LQQLVCibc-ZV9SqAJB3PGHoMawFz-zQPS-V6tTMHHA7XDjMwJFs3XKF0_S-VJpgkdPSS3Lj_GZRsZgRfkv4iOBQTx5a19Q%3D)

I strongly believe that the current trend of pushing radical ideologies like Critical Race Theory (CRT), gender identity politics, and other divisive teachings is harmful to our children's education and undermines the fundamental principles upon which our country was founded.

[Will you take a moment now to sign the pledge to affirm your commitment to ensure that our children and grandchildren receive a quality education free from ideological indoctrination?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c4eec50d78984ef6bdd0f2e9cb26023d&_e=4_23WpkzPwqJxShgmgeteoWQ_4R38hQ9qYA7GTDlOyIXcMypstIJRmSCnOb8RYpWRv-wFNSTR7nDi7cIfW-JzWB1cLU-JItJHrXQE9sY8HxHrBcCz68urUegR5qjA0McdQuo2ZupfLSSNxVl_aC4Y6_ekXPOu4YxSLB5JWvjtRkd8ffYjCiT0u1707mWkvX1wQLsqtm_y1d4gpaZzuIAm9JEIhYYFUbcHzH_ddHq30N1avlwaPqCk-z0JDEdiK5RKWcMzE8kzJ23rao938nxxzND9MIDY5ScLkiY_Iv5lCjKLGakcika5pUdXxcqebTZKsZSTlgvSuL5o9mS2b6uuwsXwo1KW2ruxwGbk2SoXXKd8cXe2UFcHexrPzHMzIOaFIgxkqL_pIwwdGgo7-FReVx4vTPrpRmXOxTrTpQgHys%3D)

Do you want to sit by and allow the infiltration of woke ideology into classrooms to continue leading to the politicization of education and the indoctrination of students with divisive and often inaccurate narratives about our history and society?

I know I don't because woke curriculum promotes a victimhood mentality and perpetuates a culture of grievance rather than empowering students to succeed based on their merits.

**Do you share my concern about the erosion of parental rights and the imposition of ideological agendas on impressionable young minds?**

**If you believe parents should have the primary authority to guide their children's education and instill values that align with their beliefs, please sign the pledge below:**

[**https://offers.americancornerstone.org/parental-rights-pledge/**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c4eec50d78984ef6bdd0f2e9cb26023d&_e=4_23WpkzPwqJxShgmgeteoWQ_4R38hQ9qYA7GTDlOyIXcMypstIJRmSCnOb8RYpWRv-wFNSTR7nDi7cIfW-JzWB1cLU-JItJHrXQE9sY8HxHrBcCz68urUegR5qjA0McdQuo2ZupfLSSNxVl_aC4Y6_ekXPOu4YxSLB5JWvjtRkd8ffYjCiT0u1707mWkvX1wQLsqtm_y1d4gpaZzuIAm9JEIhYYFUbcHzH_ddHq30N1avlwaPqCk-z0JDEdiK5RKWcMzE8kzJ23rao938nxxw8ZcIjPmIjDBj9olXU3qshjtrkRmU7j_BUnBbRLvGdff35VsZwsiLfZNkPw3MOSXVh3UcVmErKuPwm37hKMI2ytK35RikGyP3b2vfEEfRfYtJFdKpCKTUG5D5WzLWX8V0V-qvlY_G8IAkj_aOIpfWk%3D)

Your signature on the pledge will be used to urge our school boards, administrators, and policymakers to reject woke curriculum and instead prioritize academic excellence, objective teaching of history, and respect for parental rights.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute |
---
|
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c4e3574337024b32bf99d5641900456a&_e=-WiN33Mboyr7jxDy0nbH4TnuFFtuBgg0UGo3KDj8TDz2uWLLvJLwd-LiNqQY5iKFXrK0YXGKpUc6UsXVcwu5VuyNkEZquMw-0HqpozFT3TGuS5PTAqvcl_VpNPtEx1pSw1lax8I7Di9lwqaQnY6Bo7CI8Zw_MWc4J4oeGEE-sXGmYKuiMnWfM3YN_5N5QPXUGY95iScxsjs7EemZ5vK_V7OTzr3N95IDE-cu_eZ55WKfJJ-ATVKna_y8QtZrXQQjowYu9y3EEIfO_C_Xe6ZtvuunFB08Yv5ld3LVGjaUbmczmd9cLlkqhsNf4rV53GXLQvF2BP4xlJW4u6-6_PT-B0UyVCyPFv01eqwAcxW_KzvNztoHHmQ8uE1cPMGZ7Xyoj9xI8BIUEB-ftuXODXdppm7UcvFZFjK-HYMKmOr2wsG2xUXCQNdqxtNYufXmQ8RN)" which you can now own on DVD.

| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c4e3574337024b32bf99d5641900456a&_e=-WiN33Mboyr7jxDy0nbH4TnuFFtuBgg0UGo3KDj8TDz2uWLLvJLwd-LiNqQY5iKFXrK0YXGKpUc6UsXVcwu5VuyNkEZquMw-0HqpozFT3TGuS5PTAqvcl_VpNPtEx1pSw1lax8I7Di9lwqaQnY6Bo7CI8Zw_MWc4J4oeGEE-sXGmYKuiMnWfM3YN_5N5QPXUGY95iScxsjs7EemZ5vK_V7OTzr3N95IDE-cu_eZ55WKfJJ-ATVKna_y8QtZrXQQjAXKIdJJmQNbsa-ghWC5vMrzBykPavzCEwB8fmB5LFsS8wkrG5JeCuW36E2TmfCx6o1Nx88EBn_1kapsUs03dF48uMuua2EEwGQIpJA3pEzysaFSCnRLKpkyjRiMj-8mgjAb6Fen0PqWPWsxW5C94ed0bu368G9UhPpSuJyYUPFcM8zSR6-0cIM_kf6WNR355)

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c4e3574337024b32bf99d5641900456a&_e=-WiN33Mboyr7jxDy0nbH4TnuFFtuBgg0UGo3KDj8TDz2uWLLvJLwd-LiNqQY5iKFXrK0YXGKpUc6UsXVcwu5VuyNkEZquMw-0HqpozFT3TGuS5PTAqvcl_VpNPtEx1pSw1lax8I7Di9lwqaQnY6Bo7CI8Zw_MWc4J4oeGEE-sXGmYKuiMnWfM3YN_5N5QPXUGY95iScxsjs7EemZ5vK_V7OTzr3N95IDE-cu_eZ55WKfJJ-ATVKna_y8QtZrXQQjAXKIdJJmQNbsa-ghWC5vMrzBykPavzCEwB8fmB5LFsRA21aySXMo7FPcc2K5Zk6G-NV5Ot9BXflpVuNEyJ2RN8NDvS0fVywRNnCJoAHul59bwwrf3V4w9krTtiB896Izt7vwklQyNah5M_vjAZ0fT3Kr3u6N_y8Jl1AR39U9nmDfj8GsBcVRn5F5Jsxt3OR_).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning

clean_body: C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. | | | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century. That's why we produced "" which you can now own on DVD. | | | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including: good and evil, conversion and faith, prayer and the Bible, suffering and death, * heaven and hell, and much more. Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | .

And not only that — if they control enough state legislatures, **they can call a constitutional convention and _rewrite_ our country's founding document**.

The GOP has made it crystal clear that their goal is the destruction of fundamental freedoms for every American who can get pregnant. We won't let them get away with it, Peter.

name: The Team at No Dem Left Behind
subject: Memorial Day 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC
body:
Let's take this Memorial Day to appreciate the courageous people who have been willing to put their lives on the line for this great country.
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
| |
## Memorial Day 2024
---
---
This Memorial Day, we come together to honor and remember the brave men and women who have made the ultimate sacrifice for our country. It is a time to reflect on the freedoms we enjoy and to express our gratitude to those who have given their lives in service to our nation. We need to show this love and dedication to veterans every day of the year, and that's why Democrats are fighting for initiatives to accomplish that. Democrats are dedicated to making a positive difference in the lives of veterans and servicemembers, including a commitment to building a 21st-century Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) that delivers world-class care to those who have served. Initiatives have been created to focus on the empowerment of veterans and the utilization of their unique skill sets to strengthen our economy and communities. Democrats recognize the importance of providing veterans with access to education, employment, and financial opportunities that enable civic engagement. In addition to supporting veterans, Democrats stand with military families who serve alongside their loved ones in uniform, recognizing the sacrifices made by military spouses and children. That is why, as a nation, we must be committed to supporting these individuals as they pursue their education and careers. Let us celebrate Memorial Day with pride, respect, and a deep sense of gratitude. May we always remember the cost of our freedom and strive to honor the legacy of those who have served with unwavering commitment. The selfless sacrifice made by these individuals embody the true spirit of patriotism and serves as a testament to the enduring values that unite us as Americans.
---

name: Dominic Rapini
subject: Discussing Frederick Douglass and the GOP Brand on Gary Byron Tommorow
body:
With Special Guests author KCarl Smith and Chris Colye | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/40634560f017/a-milestone-event-the-frederick-douglass-celebration-13563555?e=8763c56857)
---
|
---
|
# Talking Frederick Douglass
Talk of Connecticut with Gary Byron
---
[LISTEN IN at 9:10am ](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=984fc28fca&e=8763c56857)
|
# Tomorrow Morning
---
|
# Tuesday May 28th @ 9:10am
Dominic Rapini, Chris Coyle and Author, KCarl Smith
---
|
# Call in with questions
‭(860) 243-1360‬
---
|
---
|
# KCarl is The Way to Go
Above Right
---
| A former U.S. Army officer, KCarl is a nationally recognized speaker, author and the innovative mind behind the Frederick Douglass Republican Engagement Strategy, a persuasive messaging approach that's built on real-world successes. He is considered the foremost expert on diversity outreach and conservative messaging.
For more than 15 years, KCarl has empowered thousands of conservatives, Republican Party state, county and precinct leaders, with his proprietary, game-changing diversity outreach best practice. He has spoken to more than 600 conservative, Republican and faith-based organizations. KCarl is a former member of President Trump's Presidential Campaign Coalition Advisory Board.
KCarl is the author of the bestselling book, "Frederick Douglass Republicans: The Movement to Re-Ignite America's Passion for Liberty and his latest release, "Telling Conservatives the Truth: Leveraging the Life-Empowers Values of Frederick Douglass to Save America."
---
|
# Chris Coyle
Above left Chairman, Pomfret RTC, Founder, 2WINCT Connecticut’s Resource for all things Frederick Douglass!!
---
|
---
|
---
|

# A Republican Reclamation Project
Don Pesci
---
[Subscribe to Don' Pescis Substack ](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=c2167f5954&e=8763c56857)
| Connecticut and national politics is becoming a game of rote and numbers.As part of his 2024 presidential campaign, Joe Biden traveled to Morehead College in Kentucky to reassure Black students that his administration had not forgotten them. Some critics asserted that the Morehouse event had been used by Biden to spread a message to a wider audience – anti-Israeli mobs storming various credulous college student bodies, young voters turning away, according to polls, from their Daddy’s Democrat Party, and a click-dependent left oriented national media.
National polls showing Biden sinking in the estimation of American Black voters put a spring in his faltering 81-year-old step.This, in part, is what Biden said of the Republican Party: The Democrat Party -- not the party of Abe Lincoln and [Frederick Douglass](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=9b76fa45e6&e=8763c56857) \-- is the party of forward movement among Blacks. The Republican Party is anchored in an outmoded past, systemically racist, and led by MAGA Yahoos.Past voting patterns show that Blacks in large cities vote, one might say programmatically, in favor of the Democrat Party. Large cities in the United States such as Chicago and, here in Connecticut, Bridgeport, the state’s most populous city, are Democrat cisterns in which votes are stored and then let loose during campaign seasons.
Connecticut Democrats have only to win massive majorities in the state’s Democrat Party urban reservations, a near certainty, and then harvest a sufficient number of votes in the state’s suburbs to attain office. Such have been the mechanics of politics in Connecticut for the past three decades or more. The last Republican chief executive in Bridgeport was Mary Moran, who left office in 1991. There are no Republicans in Connecticut’s U.S. Congressional Delegation.
Nationally, Democrats favor the elimination of the Electoral College, an important U.S. Constitutional feature that prevents large population centers from exercising permanent political dominion over small states. Perhaps the chief reason Democrats prefer that presidents be elected by a popular vote is that they control large crumbling cities. Presidents elected by votes garnered in larger states and cities may with impunity deny the franchise to smaller states. This arrangement, clearly anti-democratic, seems to satisfy Democrats in Connecticut such as 3rd District congresswoman Rosa DeLauro, who has been in office for 33 years. DeLauro, relying on votes from large cities in her gerrymandered district, has been reelected 16 times, always with more than 56% of the vote.
In its Gerrymander Project, [FiveThirtyEight](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=6164814d63&e=8763c56857) produced an eye-opening map showing “How often we'd expect a party to win each of Connecticut’s 5 seats over the long term — not specifically the 2018 midterms — based on historical patterns since 2006.”
By way of example, U.S. Representative John Larson’s 1st District regularly produces a vote in which the chance of being represented by a Republican is a slender 2.9%, while the chance of being represented by a Democrat is a fulsome 79.1%. In Rosa DeLauro’s 3rd District, the figures are: chance of being represented by a Democrat 94.2%, chance of being represented by a Republican 5.8 %. And in Jim Himes’ 4th District, the figures are: chance of being represented by a Republican 9.9%, chance of being represented by a Democrat 90.1%. The racial or ethnic makeup of all Connecticut Districts is “predominantly White.”
**Republicans have yet to mount a sustained effort to increase Republican chances in Democrat urban fiefdoms by, say, 10% among Blacks, some of whom appear ready to bolt the Democrat Party in 2024.**
But, here in the state, a Republican Party reclamation effort is underway, the brainchild of Dominic Rapini, the talented Republican political polymath who ran for Connecticut Secretary of State in 2022. The Republican Party is historically the party of emancipation under President Abraham Lincoln, the party that, pre-emancipation, opposed fugitive slave laws, the party that resolutely opposed Jim Crow once southern reconstruction had ebbed, the party that promoted both the Civil Rights Act of 1866, a precursor to the 14thAmendment, and the Civil Rights Act of 1964. There can be no doubt that historically, the Republican Party had advanced minority interests ever since the end of the Civil War through modern times.The comically absurd notion that the Republican Party is systemically and objectively racist is not only a slur upon the party; it is a crude attempt to repeal history from the Civil War forward.
**In Branford Connecticut this June 5th, thanks to Republicans mindful of the history of their party, the Branford Republican Town Committee will be hosting its first annual**[**Frederick Douglass Celebration Event**](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=0e17134949&e=8763c56857)**. Like Lincoln, Douglass now belongs to history. Both were, in their own day, courageous apostles of liberty, and those of us who know that history is the imprint of the spirit of a country, know also that the undying courage to do right expires when a country’s real history is either forgotten or overlaid with bastardized and fanciful attempts to destroy the past so that the future may conform to destructive ideological modalities.**
---
[Click Here for Tickets, Sponsorships, Advertising ](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=86b69df72f&e=8763c56857)
|
---
[Click Here for Tickets, Sponsorships, Advertising ](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=291ca8fc56&e=8763c56857)
|
---
|
# Why Frederick Douglass?
---
| **A Force for Uniting the United States:** Frederick Douglass serves as a powerful symbol for Republicans to promote the values and principles that make our nation unique. He was born into slavery in 1818, but later became one of the leading advocates for reuniting our nation as the Civil War came to an end. His strong conviction in the power of our founding values and constitutional principles, along with his self-learned eloquence, helped guide Abraham Lincoln and the recently formed Republican party to win a second term based on these values and principles. Lincoln faced the daunting challenge of rescuing a nation divided by the Civil War.
**Believed in American Principles:** History tells us that Lincoln's wholehearted embrace of Douglass's message of fighting for and preserving the values that formed our nation was not only the winning message, but also the roadmap for reunification. Today, as our nation becomes increasingly fragmented along political issues and divergent views of our fundamental values and principles of freedom, engaging people based on this former slave's unassailable historical contribution offers the most effective messaging for winning new hearts and minds.
**A Symbol of Republican Values:** Just as Lincoln turned to Douglass for guiding the salvation of America, Republicans can leverage Douglass as a pivotal symbol for fully realizing the greatness of our country. In a historical context, emulating Lincoln and using the impactful legacy of Frederick Douglass serves to open the door to all voters to find common ground and reunite our country.
**Frederick Douglass played a crucial role in the birth of the Republican Party:** The Republican Party was founded in 1854 by abolitionists who aimed to end slavery and advocate for the civil rights of Black people, with Frederick Douglass playing a significant role in initiating the political campaign.
---

Connecticut Democrats have only to win massive majorities in the state’s Democrat Party urban reservations, a near certainty, and then harvest a sufficient number of votes in the state’s suburbs to attain office. Such have been the mechanics of politics in Connecticut for the past three decades or more. The last Republican chief executive in Bridgeport was Mary Moran, who left office in 1991. There are no Republicans in Connecticut’s U.S. Congressional Delegation. Nationally, Democrats favor the elimination of the Electoral College, an important U.S. Constitutional feature that prevents large population centers from exercising permanent political dominion over small states. Perhaps the chief reason Democrats prefer that presidents be elected by a popular vote is that they control large crumbling cities. Presidents elected by votes garnered in larger states and cities may with impunity deny the franchise to smaller states. This arrangement, clearly anti-democratic, seems to satisfy Democrats in Connecticut such as 3rd District congresswoman Rosa DeLauro, who has been in office for 33 years. DeLauro, relying on votes from large cities in her gerrymandered district, has been reelected 16 times, always with more than 56% of the vote. In its Gerrymander Project, produced an eye-opening map showing “How often we'd expect a party to win each of Connecticut’s 5 seats over the long term — not specifically the 2018 midterms — based on historical patterns since 2006.” By way of example, U.S. Representative John Larson’s 1st District regularly produces a vote in which the chance of being represented by a Republican is a slender 2.9%, while the chance of being represented by a Democrat is a fulsome 79.1%. In Rosa DeLauro’s 3rd District, the figures are: chance of being represented by a Democrat 94.2%, chance of being represented by a Republican 5.8 %. And in Jim Himes’ 4th District, the figures are: chance of being represented by a Republican 9.9%, chance of being represented by a Democrat 90.1%. The racial or ethnic makeup of all Connecticut Districts is “predominantly White.” Republicans have yet to mount a sustained effort to increase Republican chances in Democrat urban fiefdoms by, say, 10% among Blacks, some of whom appear ready to bolt the Democrat Party in 2024. But, here in the state, a Republican Party reclamation effort is underway, the brainchild of Dominic Rapini, the talented Republican political polymath who ran for Connecticut Secretary of State in 2022. The Republican Party is historically the party of emancipation under President Abraham Lincoln, the party that, pre-emancipation, opposed fugitive slave laws, the party that resolutely opposed Jim Crow once southern reconstruction had ebbed, the party that promoted both the Civil Rights Act of 1866, a precursor to the 14thAmendment, and the Civil Rights Act of 1964. There can be no doubt that historically, the Republican Party had advanced minority interests ever since the end of the Civil War through modern times.The comically absurd notion that the Republican Party is systemically and objectively racist is not only a slur upon the party; it is a crude attempt to repeal history from the Civil War forward. In Branford Connecticut this June 5th, thanks to Republicans mindful of the history of their party, the Branford Republican Town Committee will be hosting its first annual. Like Lincoln, Douglass now belongs to history. Both were, in their own day, courageous apostles of liberty, and those of us who know that history is the imprint of the spirit of a country, know also that the undying courage to do right expires when a country’s real history is either forgotten or overlaid with bastardized and fanciful attempts to destroy the past so that the future may conform to destructive ideological modalities. | | | Why Frederick Douglass? | A Force for Uniting the United States: Frederick Douglass serves as a powerful symbol for Republicans to promote the values and principles that make our nation unique. He was born into slavery in 1818, but later became one of the leading advocates for reuniting our nation as the Civil War came to an end. His strong conviction in the power of our founding values and constitutional principles, along with his self-learned eloquence, helped guide Abraham Lincoln and the recently formed Republican party to win a second term based on these values and principles. Lincoln faced the daunting challenge of rescuing a nation divided by the Civil War. Believed in American Principles: History tells us that Lincoln's wholehearted embrace of Douglass's message of fighting for and preserving the values that formed our nation was not only the winning message, but also the roadmap for reunification. Today, as our nation becomes increasingly fragmented along political issues and divergent views of our fundamental values and principles of freedom, engaging people based on this former slave's unassailable historical contribution offers the most effective messaging for winning new hearts and minds. A Symbol of Republican Values: Just as Lincoln turned to Douglass for guiding the salvation of America, Republicans can leverage Douglass as a pivotal symbol for fully realizing the greatness of our country. In a historical context, emulating Lincoln and using the impactful legacy of Frederick Douglass serves to open the door to all voters to find common ground and reunite our country. Frederick Douglass played a crucial role in the birth of the Republican Party: The Republican Party was founded in 1854 by abolitionists who aimed to end slavery and advocate for the civil rights of Black people, with Frederick Douglass playing a significant role in initiating the political campaign. | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Copyright (C) 2024 Dominic For CT. All rights reserved. You have signed up to be a support of mine. Our mailing address is: Dominic For CT 4 Mariners Way Branford, CT 06405-4481 USA Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or |

name: Upset the Setup
subject: BREAKING: Louisiana's Attack on Reproductive Rights 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85737572/475709863/18334046?refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240527_2_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZmNGQ2ODRmLTZhMWMtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zlgxHxPv7NQpSj9MdkZRlAU4rzgo045FnVLbsNeimso=)
**Last week, the Louisiana Legislature took a devastating step by passing a bill that reclassifies abortion-inducing drugs as controlled dangerous substances. This unprecedented move will severely restrict access to essential reproductive healthcare,_endangering the lives of countless women_.**
The GOP is relentless in its war on women's rights. By reclassifying mifepristone and misoprostol, they are not protecting women; they are controlling them. These drugs are critical for treating miscarriages, inducing labor, and stopping life-threatening hemorrhages.
This bill will make it nearly impossible for doctors to prescribe these medications, putting women’s health and lives at risk.
We cannot stand by and let this happen. This is part of a broader Republican strategy to dismantle reproductive rights state by state. We need to fight back NOW.

clean_body: = Last week, the Louisiana Legislature took a devastating step by passing a bill that reclassifies abortion-inducing drugs as controlled dangerous substances. This unprecedented move will severely restrict access to essential reproductive healthcare,endangering the lives of countless women. The GOP is relentless in its war on women's rights. By reclassifying mifepristone and misoprostol, they are not protecting women; they are controlling them. These drugs are critical for treating miscarriages, inducing labor, and stopping life-threatening hemorrhages. This bill will make it nearly impossible for doctors to prescribe these medications, putting women’s health and lives at risk. We cannot stand by and let this happen. Hi friend, On Memorial Day, we honor the brave servicemembers who made the ultimate sacrifice to protect us and our freedoms. We must honor these heroes and their loved ones today and every day. As we spend time with family and friends this Memorial Day, let us rededicate ourselves to honor the ultimate sacrifice our service members take on to defend our way of life and all that America stands for — the promise of freedom and opportunity for all. We must honor these fallen heroes with action. Mark

If you are concerned about medical freedom and you are not aware of [**Ohioans for Medical Freedom (OAMF)**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=3fe3ff5522&e=5c740fa3e2), you should be. OAMF is a non-partisan organization advocating for your right to choose or refuse any medical treatment or procedure. OAMF especially needs your help NOW.

Why?

Ohio House Bill (HB) 73, the "[**Dave and Angie Patient and Health Provider Protection Act**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=5c4561745f&e=5c740fa3e2)", is working it's way through the legislative process in Columbus. Last week, OAMF supporters and volunteers testified in favor of the legislation to the Senate subcommittee debating the bill. You can find links to their in-person testimony by going [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=62264c9923&e=5c740fa3e2). It's impressive!

NOW is the time to be calling, writing, texting, and visiting your representatives in Columbus to get this bill approved and made into Ohio law!

There is a "Call to Action" at the middle of [**THIS**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=6a979b2e0a&e=5c740fa3e2) web page on the OAMF website. Please go [**THERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=86f89fca84&e=5c740fa3e2) and do as asked. It will only take a few minutes to email the Ohio Senators who must vote YES on this extremely important legislation!

Also be sure to register on the OAMF site to get regular updates on the legislation's progress! You can visit the OAMF web site by clicking [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=23063ebe32&e=5c740fa3e2) or on the image below.

THANK YOU!

---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=ff58e3a6e2&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
---
| |
**"MUST READ" & "CAN'T MISS"
SUBSTACKS TO HELP PEOPLE
BETTER UNDERSTAND
SELF-GOVERNANCE IN OHIO**

---
|
Here are 4 "must read" and "must subscribe" Substacks focused on government, politics, and self-governance in Ohio. They are in alphabetical order by title because it's impossible to rank these by value & importance. They are all valuable & important. Every Ohioan should be subscribed to these web publications. They are required basic reading to understand the state of our state without mainstream media and party insider "spin". In other words, they are: _**the rest of the story**_.

[**Ken McEntee**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=7a3ae65c71&e=5c740fa3e2)

[**The Patriot Mind Newsletter**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=a9f51e0d08&e=5c740fa3e2)

[**The Republican Reformist**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=89ceedc49b&e=5c740fa3e2)

[**Update from Jess Franz ORP SCC 5**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=a79805d8df&e=5c740fa3e2)

If you have suggestions on any additions to this list, feel free to call or text Mark Pukita at 614-499-0599 (c) and make a recommendation. You can email him too: [mark@mark4ohio.com](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=4294ff3e5b&e=5c740fa3e2)

THANK YOU!
---
|
---
| |
**KEEP AMERICA FOR AMERICANS!
CHINA'S SILENT WAR ON AMERICA!**

---
|
This week we sent out a one-time special message about a new initiative called "**America for Americans** " designed to wake up more Ohioans to the threat China poses to our communities, state, and nation. If you haven't seen that message, you can access a copy of it on the web [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=08dba019ff&e=5c740fa3e2).

As you'll read, part of this initiative is an Ohio-developed, 10-week "course" titled, “**China’s Silent War on America** ”. A lesson will be released on Wednesdays every week for 10 weeks. To remind you, we'll highlight each new lesson in this email.

How did this initiative come about?

Recently, grassroots leaders in Ohio became acutely aware of the many national security threats posed by Communist China as Communist China attempts to embed itself into every aspect of America’s economy, politics, society (including our schools), and sovereignty. China’s major goal is to establish itself as the dominant force on the globe thereby establishing a new world order. This will require the takeover of the United States.

Communist China is currently waging war with America; a war they plan on winning. It is a war where the weapons do not have physical bullets but it’s a war nonetheless. If America is to survive this war we must first arm ourselves with knowledge so we may mobilize our forces to push back against this silent invasion.

We must never forget America was founded on freedom and that Communist China was founded on the suppression of freedom. These two ideologies cannot co-exist. We have an important decision to make or it will be made for us by Communist China.

That said, **America for Americans** will provide a short lesson each of the next ten weeks to educate the reader on the many strategies China is using to undermine America’s power at home and abroad, while enriching its own homeland. The reader will also be guided towards action items to help reduce China’s influence in the state of Ohio.

Click [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=c61b825725&e=5c740fa3e2) or on the image below to access **Lesson 1** of “**China’s Silent War on America** ”.

_Next week's lesson, Lesson 2: China’s Goal of World Domination Using the Belt and Road Initiative._

THANK YOU!

My campaign relies on $5 donations, not million-dollar checks, friend. Now, I'm proud of that, but it also means I need folks like you chipping in what you can, when you can, to power our campaign to victory.

But if we fail to reach this, we could fall behind, just as the election year ramps up. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sherrod Brown and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Look, winning this race will be anything but easy: Mitch McConnell has personally named me a top target for defeat – and my GOP opponent is writing himself multimillion-dollar checks to try and buy this seat. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I’ve never done this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| This is the most competitive reelection of my life.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2690%2E35263%2EnGbKgV)
Peter, I’ve had my fair share of close elections before — but this race is shaping up to be my most challenging yet. I’ve never faced a self-funding megamillionaire who promised to spend _$20 million_ to defeat me. I’ve never had an opponent cut himself an $8 million check to close the gap in our race, **leading to a 50–50 tie in the polls.** I’ve never faced so many Republican attacks this far out from Election Day from my opponent and the right-wing dark money groups supporting him. **There’s no doubt in my mind, Peter — this is the most competitive reelection of my life.** But with this incredible grassroots team by my side, I know we have what it takes to win. **[Peter, help my reelection campaign overcome our toughest challenge yet by chipping in towards our critical end-of-month fundraising goal before our deadline this Friday>>](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-may24.HLGTSS&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240527_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2690%2E35263%2EnGbKgV)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=tbe-em-may24.viyL1N&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240527_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2690%2E35263%2EnGbKgV)

name: Chuck Morse
subject: Honoring Our Heroes this Memorial Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse, Dan Norris Treasurer
body:
| | | |
---
| | Derek,
As we come together to observe Memorial Day, I want to take a moment to express my deepest gratitude to all the brave men and women who have served our country. Their courage, dedication, and ultimate sacrifice are the foundation of the freedoms we cherish, and their legacy continues to inspire us every day.
I also want to give a special tribute to the families of our fallen heroes. Your strength and resilience in the face of unimaginable loss are a testament to the profound love and commitment that binds us as a nation. You carry the torch of remembrance, ensuring that the sacrifices of your loved ones are never forgotten.
Whether you are a veteran, a family member of someone who served, or simply someone who deeply appreciates the sacrifices made, I want to wish you a reflective and heartfelt Memorial Day. Your dedication to honoring our heroes makes our communities stronger, and I hope you feel the profound gratitude of our entire nation not just today, but every day.
Once again, thank you to all the incredible individuals who have served and to those who support them.
---
| | In Liberty, Chuck Morse
---
| |
---
|
---
|

| |
---
|

NH 03073

name: Jill Stein
subject: Remember Rafah
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
body:
Soldiers are far from the only victims of war.

| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=_memorial_day&n=1)
---
Peter,

Your inbox today will no doubt be filled with politicians, companies, organizations, and influencers paying somber tribute to the soldiers we sent to war who didn’t make it home.

But who do you remember on Memorial Day?

The horrible, unforgettable, _unforgivable_ images coming out of Rafah right now demand our attention.
---
[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/r?u=hv8dYCeGJ9MVGszQlAtA3A5sopJvcU_WBnRaWPFx16GvkDlQl5UME9AYc1CWvO9y&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=_memorial_day&n=2)
---
As an activist who has campaigned for peace my entire life, I am compelled to draw attention to the fact that soldiers are far from the only ones who pay the ultimate sacrifice in war.

In fact, every war in the modern era has led to far more civilian casualties than troop deaths.

**But what’s happening in Gaza right now is no war. It is a genocide carried out by an apartheid state – funded and supplied by America.

** What is the point of Memorial Day if not to remember _them_ and commit to peace?

Today we remember the more than 36,000 Palestinians murdered since the start of the latest Israeli assault on Gaza – at least 15,000 of whom are children.

Today we remember the estimated 300,000 – likely more than 500,000 – Iraqi civilians who died during the U.S. invasion and occupation that began 21 years ago.

Today we remember the more than 70,000 Afghans killed during America’s so-called war on terrorism.

Today we remember the uncounted and unknown casualties of American imperialism through the ages.

We can never measure what was stolen from humanity when their lives were snuffed out in a war they didn’t start. How many shattered dreams, unfulfilled promises? How much untapped human potential did we lose?

**War takes everything from us. It tears apart families and communities and countries. But the gravest thing war can take from us is our very humanity.

** Three months ago, Aaron Bushnell performed an extreme act of resistance and gave his life to protest this genocide because “this is what our ruling class had decided will be normal.”

It is not and it cannot be. _We will not allow this to ever be normal.

_ We will use our voice to expose the true and complete cost of war. We will recommit to peace. We will end this genocide. And we _will_ free Palestine.

In solidarity and gratitude,

Jill

P.S. In lieu of contributions to our campaign today, please donate to UNRWA to support the people of Gaza and their continued struggle to survive Israel’s genocide.
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/r?u=hv8dYCeGJ9MVGszQlAtA3A5sopJvcU_WBnRaWPFx16GvkDlQl5UME9AYc1CWvO9y&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=_memorial_day&n=3 "Donate to UNRWA") [Donate to UNRWA](https://www.jillstein2024.com/r?u=hv8dYCeGJ9MVGszQlAtA3A5sopJvcU_WBnRaWPFx16GvkDlQl5UME9AYc1CWvO9y&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=_memorial_day&n=3)
---
* * *
---

---

P.O. Box 4359, Fall River, MA 02723-0415

---
