name: Team ECU/LAV Action
subject: The GOP is ATTACKING the postal service!!
body:
Ever since mail-in voting became a more accessible and convenient way to exercise voting rights, Republicans have been committed to defunding the Postal Service. They know that the USPS is crucial to voting-by-mail, and they want to destroy it. | | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85739493/475716205/444630146?refcode=5-26-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzNTRiMzRiLTc1MWMtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eIdP-kyePCVy5Ri5IC80PiBRu82BPEtilv_PsK7EWR4=)
---
| | Friend, Ever since mail-in voting became a more accessible and convenient way to exercise voting rights, Republicans have been committed to defunding the Postal Service. They know that the USPS is _crucial_ to voting-by-mail, and they want to destroy it. It’s bad enough that the GOP is threatening mail-in voting by attacking the Postal Service, but they’re doing more than that! The Postal Service is _crucial_ for people to receive medications, not to mention keeping in touch with loved ones and shipping important items across the country. ****[****The USPS is a crucial part of the government, and something that every single one of us uses. It should be free from these partisan politics being pushed by the GOP. If you support vote-by-mail and the Postal Service, chip in $10 today so we can keep protecting it from Republican attacks and fighting for pro-voting rights legislation.****](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85739495/475716207/444630146?refcode=5-26-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzNTRiMzRiLTc1MWMtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eIdP-kyePCVy5Ri5IC80PiBRu82BPEtilv_PsK7EWR4=)**** Trump made his hatred of mail-in voting a cornerstone of his campaigns, saying that it caused fraud. But we know better. Mail-in voting is a cornerstone of our democracy that allows folks all across the country to exercise their right to vote, and there’s _no_ __ proof that it causes any sort of fraud. **[Mail-in voting is necessary for a robust 21st century democracy, and the GOP is threatening the Postal Service to prevent us from exercising our rights. It is a transparent attack on our democracy and they must be held accountable. We know that you don’t agree with these ridiculous attacks, and by contributing $10 today, we can keep working to protect it as hard as we can.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85739496/475716209/444630146?refcode=5-26-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzNTRiMzRiLTc1MWMtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eIdP-kyePCVy5Ri5IC80PiBRu82BPEtilv_PsK7EWR4=)** The continuous attacks on mail-in voting are proof that the GOP doesn’t care about democratic principles and our right to the ballot box. These attempts to destroy the Postal Service are just another example of Republicans trying to prevent mail-in voting by any means necessary. **[These attacks are wrong and need to stop. Please chip in $10 today so we can continue to fight any more attacks on our Postal Service and voting rights.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85739498/475716210/444630146?refcode=5-26-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzNTRiMzRiLTc1MWMtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eIdP-kyePCVy5Ri5IC80PiBRu82BPEtilv_PsK7EWR4=)** Thank you,— Team ECU/LAV Action

name: Brandon Herrera
subject: Running out of time (-53,970.01)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Committee
body:
Hey,
Happy Memorial Day. I hope you're enjoying the day off but also taking a moment to remember and honor those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country.
It's just about twenty-four hours until the polls close. We've done four events today, and I can feel the momentum is with me--we are "thisclose" to victory.
However, we're still $53,970.01 away from our budget goal to fund our final day of Get Out The Vote (GOTV) activities.
Will you help us close the gap? After tomorrow, it will be too late.
Please help with a donation today at [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/BkZlsnMsjpe34catUgC18w/s19IU789291mx4wWCyPPpFXA).

After Tuesday's election, I'll notify one lucky donor that they've earned a trip for two to San Antonio to fire the AK-50 and be featured in a future video.
Thank you!

Brandon

name: Jill Stein 2024
subject: Join Jill for two special events this week!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
body:
Green candidate forum Tuesday; Rally with special guest Thursday!

| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forum_and_rally&n=1)
---
Peter,
**** As our campaign continues to build momentum, we want to invite you to not one, but **two** special events this week! First, on Tuesday please join Green Party presidential candidate Jill Stein for a Green Party Congressional Candidates Forum with Kymone Freeman, Chibu Asonye, Chester Todd, Justin Paglino, Jason Call, Clyde Shabazz, and Michael Dublin Tuesday May 28th at 8pm Eastern time! The Jill Stein for President campaign team is excited to present this incredible slate of Green Party candidates running across the country to give voters a choice to vote for an end to endless war and genocide, an economy that works for working people, and a just, livable future for our children. **RSVP now on our site to receive a Zoom link to join Tuesday's congressional candidate forum:**
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/forum?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forum_and_rally&n=2 "RSVP NOW") [RSVP NOW](https://www.jillstein2024.com/forum?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forum_and_rally&n=2)
---
[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/forum?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forum_and_rally&n=3)
---
Then please **join Jill on Thursday at 7:30pm ET for a virtual rally with Tribal Attorney and Advocate Tara Houska!** **RSVP now on our site to receive a Zoom link to join Thursday's rally:**
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/rally?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forum_and_rally&n=4 "RSVP NOW") [RSVP NOW](https://www.jillstein2024.com/rally?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forum_and_rally&n=4)
---
[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/rally?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forum_and_rally&n=5)
---
As the parties of war and Wall Street fall in line behind historically unpopular candidates, a record number of voters are hungry for a real change. In this unprecedented moment, Jill Stein has been campaigning across the country to connect with people who are ready to take on the corrupt political establishment. Jill and her team are working tirelessly to put an anti-genocide, pro-worker, climate action campaign on the ballot nationwide - so that voters can have a real choice this year. Please join these two powerhouse champions for people, planet, and peace to fire up the fight to get our pro-worker, anti-genocide, climate action campaign on the ballot across the country. Thank you for all you do to support Jill as she leads the charge for people, planet, and peace. We hope you can join us for these two exciting events!

**In solidarity and gratitude,**

The Jill Stein 2024 team
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donation_ny?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forum_and_rally&n=6 "DONATE NOW") [DONATE NOW](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donation_ny?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forum_and_rally&n=6)
---

subject: My interview with Lawrence O'Donnell:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend,

Did you see my interview on MSNBC with Lawrence O'Donnell earlier this month about the GOP’s ongoing efforts to take away our reproductive rights?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85740045/475718178/1514755465?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3839-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmFmOTEzMS03YzFjLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0AjvrD-_AhEvgsXpm2Eeu8d6kPSoBqw8LzcxJcAeoDs=)
Let me be clear: **Extreme Republican politicians are not just trying to limit access to abortion – they’re trying to control women’s bodies and force them to make choices that may not be right for them.**
And now, dangerous anti-abortion laws across the country have shown why the fight to defend my seat in Nevada and protect our Senate majority is more critical than ever – **because if the GOP flips Nevada red, they’ll retake Senate control and push for a nationwide abortion ban.**
We simply cannot let that happen, friend. But now that _The Cook Political Report_ has downgraded my must-win race to a “Toss Up,” I need your urgent grassroots support to keep up the fight to defend Nevada and the Senate.
**With the future of reproductive rights on the line, please:_[Will you give $5 or more right now to help us protect the Senate for Democrats and restore reproductive freedom for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85740046/475718179/1514755465?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3839-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmFmOTEzMS03YzFjLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0AjvrD-_AhEvgsXpm2Eeu8d6kPSoBqw8LzcxJcAeoDs=)_**
Thank you, friend. This battle for our rights isn't going to be easy, but I know we’ll succeed as long as we stand together.

– Jacky Rosen

name: Janelle Stelson
subject: In honor of Memorial Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Janelle Stelson
body:
| | In honor of Memorial Day, I’d like to share a story from my work as a journalist.

I covered a lot of military stories over the years— from the frontlines in Kosovo, to being with the PA National Guard flying over the still-smoldering twin towers in NYC after the September 11-th attacks.

One of the most moving stories I had the privilege of telling was flying to Utah with Aggie Cohen, the mother of U.S. Marine David Cohen who was killed in Iraq. We traveled to the remote desert home of painter, Kaziah Hancock.

Kaziah— whose paintings sell for tens of thousands of dollars— paints our fallen military men and women from photographs their families send her... for free.

But she had never had anyone watch her bring them to life with paint and canvas, until our story.

When Aggie met Kaziah and stepped into her embrace, it was like watching an angel spread her wings and close them around a mother whose wounds were so badly in need of healing. My photographer and I witnessed their tears, and watched them realize the gifts they were going to give each other.

To the loved ones remembering David Cohen, Rob Seidel and Martin Kondor (and far too many others)... it was one of the greatest honors of my life to share the pain of your loss, so that we may all better understand their, and your, bravery and sacrifices.

Today, as pools open and hamburgers hit the grill, I hope you will join me in taking time to reflect on what this day is really about... and give thanks for those who gave everything to keep us safe.

Janelle Stelson
---
Paid for by Friends of Janelle Stelson
---
Friends of Janelle Stelson
P.O. Box 41
Lemoyne, PA 17043
United States
---

name: Adam Schiff
subject: My story
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=6505%2E5257348%2EWnDqaG ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek — My
story is a California story.

How a kid born in Boston, raised in the East Bay (Alamo/Danville), who
became a U.S. Forest Service Seasonal Firefighter, and later an Assistant
U.S. Attorney, a State Senator, and a member of Congress, could go on to
run for the United States Senate.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2024_abs_em.HG8rlH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240527_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=6505%2E5257348%2EWnDqaG ]Adam Schfiff as a kid, a Forest Service Seasonal Firefighter, an
Assistant U.S. Attorney, a State Senator, and a member of Congress

It is also a story about delivering for Californians.

Securing funding for more affordable housing.

Taking on corporate polluters.

Lowering health care costs and expanding access.

Defending our democracy and the sanctity of our elections.

These are the things I’ve done, and the fights I will continue to take on
in the United States Senate on behalf of all Californians.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=may2024_abs_em.WQbX9u&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240527_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=6505%2E5257348%2EWnDqaG ]With just a few days left before our monthly fundraising deadline, will
you please pitch in a few dollars to my campaign so I can continue to make
a difference for Californians?

Securing funding for more affordable housing. Taking on corporate polluters. Lowering health care costs and expanding access. Defending our democracy and the sanctity of our elections. These are the things I’ve done, and the fights I will continue to take on in the United States Senate on behalf of all Californians. [ ]With just a few days left before our monthly fundraising deadline, will you please pitch in a few dollars to my campaign so I can continue to make a difference for Californians? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $250 [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT My California story is possible because people like you have believed in me and in this country. And I believe in you, and the shared struggle for our future. Thank you for being part of this great team. — Adam [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner; text Schiff to 724433 [ ]DONATE MONTHLY 135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502 [ ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ ]Privacy Policy PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

Join us for an exclusive reception with Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and Cheryl Hines at a private venue in beautiful Santa Monica. Enjoy an evening of hors d’oeuvres, cocktails, a fireside chat, and a unique photo opportunity.
[Edmonds, Washington](https://www.kennedy24.com/edmonds-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_27_24_ra1&n=3) \- Sunday, June 9th at 4:00 PM
Experience an evening of elegance with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. at a stunning waterfront venue. This exclusive fundraiser offers a fireside chat, a Q&A session, and gourmet hors d'oeuvres and cocktails.
[Glendale, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/glendale-reception-june?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_27_24_ra1&n=4) \- Thursday, June 13th at 6:00 PM
Don’t miss this exclusive reception with Robert F. Kennedy Jr. at a private venue in Glendale. This special fundraising event includes a fireside chat, Q&A session, and a photo opportunity with RFK Jr.
* * *
RFK Jr.: Demand Open Debates! Sign the Petition
I am available any day of the week to debate.
President Biden and Former President Trump have agreed to 2 debates with one of the rules being no other candidates allowed. What are they afraid of?
The answer is obvious: Me - coming up strong in the polls.
**I am the only presidential candidate in history who has polled ahead of both major party candidates in head-to-head races.**
In fact, I am well ahead of President Biden and tied with Former President Trump among Independents. **_That is 70 million Americans_!**
The largest and most accurate polling firm in this election cycle, Zogby confirmed this in their recent poll of head-to-head matchups.
The American people deserve to see the top candidates debate.
**To make this happen, I need your help.** [Please sign our petition today to support our call for open debates. Every signature counts and brings us closer to ensuring that all voices are heard on the debate stage.](https://www.kennedy24.com/debate-petition?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_27_24_ra1&n=5)

name: SAVE THE POSTAL SERVICE (protectvoting.org)
subject: Sen. Jon Ossoff stands up to MAGA Louis DeJoy >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
your signature due by 11:59pm
| When we reached out to you to stand with Sen. Jon Ossoff in his fight to save the Postal Service, we thought a SURGE of Democrats would step up...

**But there are still 536 names missing from our signature list, and YOURS is one of them!**

[**We can’t let Trump’s Postmaster General Louis DeJoy wreak havoc on the USPS a second longer, so please sign immediately »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps/?source=VPP_20240527_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=6&akid=14815%2E878179%2EUmcSjq) | [**STAND WITH JON OSSOFF AND SAVE THE USPS FROM MAGA LOUIS DEJOY »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps/?source=VPP_20240527_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=7&akid=14815%2E878179%2EUmcSjq)
---
Thank you, we’ve attached our original message below.

_The Voter Protection Project_
**–BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE–**
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps/?source=VPP_20240527_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=8&akid=14815%2E878179%2EUmcSjq)
[**ADD YOUR NAME to our urgent petition: Stand with Jon Ossoff and help save the U.S. Postal Service »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps/?source=VPP_20240527_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=9&akid=14815%2E878179%2EUmcSjq)
[**5,000 SIGNATURE GOAL: SIGN NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps/?source=VPP_20240527_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=10&akid=14815%2E878179%2EUmcSjq)
---
Sen. Ossoff is SO right. **Trump’s handpicked Postmaster General Louis DeJoy has DESTROYED the USPS:**

→ Mail and medication delays for millions of Americans
→ Lost and damaged packages
→ Mishandled mail-in ballots _in the most critical election year of our lifetimes!_

**ENOUGH IS ENOUGH, so it’s time we send MAGA Louis DeJoy a message that we refuse to let him get away with this!**
[**Sign our petition by MIDNIGHT to stand with Jon Ossoff and SAVE the Post Office!**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps/?source=VPP_20240527_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=11&akid=14815%2E878179%2EUmcSjq)
[**ADD MY NAME NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps/?source=VPP_20240527_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=12&akid=14815%2E878179%2EUmcSjq)
---
We need you,

_Team VPP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. name: Mike Lawler
subject: Remembering and reflecting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lawler for Congress, Inc
body:
Freedom isn't free.

| | | | [ ](https://links.lawler4congress.com/els/v2/9-R~HV3zbqMK/NCs2RjZxNE9US205UkIwNkNlUXpySWpsMU41NE8yN1NQNmNYRmFUdWJiQng3bE9KV3Y4bjBDakowdlhKUGxkSUZLYU1LeU8wL3VKZzI1TEkrN0dOQ2JIMFpzeUh3WFdHMm01eko2M0J3dmc9S0/)
---
| | Peter, _Today we remember and honor those who have made the ultimate sacrifice to our nation._ This Memorial Day, let us take a moment to pay tribute to these heroes, honor their memory, and express our gratitude for their service. Whether through a moment of silence, a visit to a memorial, watching a parade, or simply sharing stories of their bravery, let us ensure that their legacy lives on. My deepest gratitude goes out to the brave men and women who lost their lives in combat, and to their families, as they fought to protect this nation that they have made great. **We must always remember that “freedom isn’t free.”** Thank you to all those who have served and continue to serve. Your bravery and sacrifice will always be remembered. Here’s wishing you a meaningful Memorial Day.
God Bless America,
---
| | [ ](https://links.lawler4congress.com/els/v2/3r_~SRVe2ahN/NCs2RjZxNE9US205UkIwNkNlUXpySWpsMU41NE8yN1NQNmNYRmFUdWJiQng3bE9KV3Y4bjBDakowdlhKUGxkSUZLYU1LeU8wL3VKZzI1TEkrN0dOQ2JIMFpzeUh3WFdHMm01eko2M0J3dmc9S0/)

name: Team WisGOP
subject: 🎗️On this day, let us remember.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
Let us remember our fallen soldiers and the sacrifices they've made.
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-e-mmhdg-didthutlhu-h/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-mmhdg-didthutlhu-r/) Friend,As Memorial Day draws near, we, as Republicans in Wisconsin, stand united in honoring the brave men and women who made the ultimate sacrifice in defense of our nation.Throughout our state's history, from the days of the Civil War to the present, over 27,000 of our fellow Wisconsinites have laid down their lives to safeguard the freedoms we hold dear. Their valor and commitment serve as a testament to the enduring spirit of patriotism that defines our great state.As we gather with family and friends to observe Memorial Day, let us take a moment to reflect on the profound sacrifices made by our fallen heroes. Their selflessness and courage inspire us to uphold the principles of liberty, justice, and democracy for which they fought so bravely.On this solemn occasion, let us renew our commitment to honoring the memory of our fallen servicemembers by supporting our veterans, active-duty military personnel, and their families. Let us also express our deepest gratitude to the Gold Star families who bear the heavy burden of loss with dignity and grace.May the legacy of our fallen heroes serve as a guiding light as we strive to build a stronger, safer, and more prosperous future for our state and our nation.
### With unwavering gratitude and respect,
### -Team WisGOP
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-mmhdg-didthutlhu-y/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-mmhdg-didthutlhu-j/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-mmhdg-didthutlhu-t/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-mmhdg-didthutlhu-i/) PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. Friend,

I'll keep this short. I'm sure you know Arizona is the heart of the 2024 election. The presidency and the Senate majority will be won or lost right here.

Unfortunately, and I hate to say this, we're losing.

Before I ask you for anything, I want you to know that my parents taught me to do a good job, do the right thing, keep my head down, worship God, and not ask anyone for anything.

But when it comes to this country, I can't put my pride first.

_**The reality is I need help. I can 't do this alone. **_

We're down in the polls, and Ruben Gallego is outraising us big time. [**Thankfully, there are still six months until the election, and if there was ever a time to fight back, it would be right now.**](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=079cd02701df431397bb58800d0e1cd5&_e=6y-oJD0xBKw4_PdVUih3UqzEUsCoohWE5T9HqAJ2u-9vhIsMG7rD9l-WgUN6raeFpZf3D0FYZckGZWUm2lLRqaPCsci4rVjONPBY5qXKgff67jRo7UmBgesOU2f_rMcdj3vCihAlz-irlAJaUMrFKEnmIWeRudy117ZogC6bp1OiAl9lyQAhd_jlTxGiUyUjDeF-LGuqloN8mF617xNnr5LsgaXaeTIe3JXI33p1_dPAiPIntrkEp_jkW29QgZZk3KFOkpv1kEjxqYzqhH4kymo0nXyMT5ECyvuAYhLNfscwk1XL8pVcbRNrA_oAsLCoEmdLmA_S1fGDLyxUQcjopbDs9LZwkr0xJys7BIivOi9a10CSAwnotpBzV7d4i1z781IpeFPC935CAG147HTCRg%3D%3D)

We're down 2 points right now; that's not a lot, right? We can catch up before the end of the month, but we will need your help.

**My team told me that if we can raise $10,000 within 48 hours, we will have the resources to IMMEDIATELY punch back at Ruben and start taking back ground in the polls. **

**_[I'M HUMBLY ASKING YOU TO CONTRIBUTE $5, $10, $25, OR ANYTHING TO HELP RAISE $10,000 IN THE NEXT 48 HOURS!](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=079cd02701df431397bb58800d0e1cd5&_e=6y-oJD0xBKw4_PdVUih3UqzEUsCoohWE5T9HqAJ2u-9vhIsMG7rD9l-WgUN6raeFpZf3D0FYZckGZWUm2lLRqaPCsci4rVjONPBY5qXKgff67jRo7UmBgesOU2f_rMcdj3vCihAlz-irlAJaUMrFKEnmIWeRudy117ZogC6bp1OiAl9lyQAhd_jlTxGiUyUjDeF-LGuqloN8mF617xNnr5LsgaXaeTIe3JXI33p1_dPAiPIntrkEp_jkW29QgZZkGfqMnIC1suj7dHrDfePxYRVn9lvLSG-uh94YIt7obSxMOlGQnHGDp-8okr_QZvxqDbkG0xKiuoH4WnEQEcnxzksckBeg93-B8uxCTOG7TSK9bzK6JyIf3VIz6wDEQFqN3rpgDI3EZ6YaChpT_X44OQ%3D%3D)_**
